AIRCO (AI Risk Compliance Ontology)

The EU Artificial Intelligence Act (AI Act) introduces a risk-based regulatory framework classifying AI systems across four categories: prohibited systems, high-risk systems, systems with transparency obligations, and General-Purpose AI systems with provider obligations. Determining which category, if any, applies requires interpreting a complex set of conditions, exceptions, and article cross-references, which is both time-consuming and error-prone when performed manually. We present AIRCO (AI Risk Compliance Ontology), an OWL 2 ontology that formally encodes the risk classification procedure of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689. AIRCO extends the AIRO and VAIR ontologies, introducing new classes for all use case templates defined in the four risk categories of the AI Act. A user or agent instantiates an AI System individual with descriptive characteristics and inference rules trace it to its applicable risk category after which further user-and-agent information input is requested to aid infer obligation and exception satisfaction. This way, AIRCO enables the possibility for classification that is machine-executable and explainable through a chain of inferred class memberships.

Authors

Marios Iacovou (Catalink Ltd)
Stavroulla Koumou (Catalink Ltd)

Ontology

https://w3id.org/airco
dcterms:description

Encodes EU AI Act risk categories, obligations, exceptions, and transparency requirements. Aligned with AIRO and VAIR ontologies.

dcterms:source

EU AI Act

dcterms:title

AI Risk Compliance Ontology

owl:imports

https://w3id.org/airo

owl:imports

https://w3id.org/vair

rdf:type

http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#Ontology

Classes

Class: airco:AIOffice   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder
    • airco:AIOffice

NOTE airco:AIOffice is a leaf node.

Description

The EU AI Office.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:AIOffice a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Office"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The EU AI Office."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> .

Class: airco:AbductionVictim   back to top

  • airco:Victim
    • airco:AbductionVictim

NOTE airco:AbductionVictim is a leaf node.

Description

A victim of abduction who is the subject of a search using real-time remote biometric identification.

Inherits from (3):
airco:Victim | https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:AbductionVictim a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Abduction Victim"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A victim of abduction who is the subject of a search using real-time remote biometric identification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Victim .

Class: airco:AgeVulnerability   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability
    • airco:AgeVulnerability

NOTE airco:AgeVulnerability is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:AgeVulnerability a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Age Vulnerability"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability> .

Class: airco:AlternativeDisputeResolution   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#SettlingDispute
    • airco:AlternativeDisputeResolution

NOTE airco:AlternativeDisputeResolution is a leaf node.

Description

Use of AI in alternative dispute resolution, classified as high risk under the administration of justice.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#SettlingDispute | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:AlternativeDisputeResolution a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Alternative Dispute Resolution"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Use of AI in alternative dispute resolution, classified as high risk under the administration of justice."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#AdministrationOfJustice> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#SettlingDispute> .

Class: airco:ArmedRobbery   back to top

  • airco:SeriousCrime
    • airco:ArmedRobbery

NOTE airco:ArmedRobbery is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (1):
airco:SeriousCrime

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ArmedRobbery a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Armed Robbery"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SeriousCrime .

Class: airco:AuthorisationBody   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder
    • airco:AuthorisationBody
      • airco:IndependentAdministrativeAuthority

Description

A body that can authorise certain AI practices.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Property Range of:
airco:requiresAuthorisation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:AuthorisationBody a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Authorisation Body"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A body that can authorise certain AI practices."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> .

Class: airco:BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer
    • airco:BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer

NOTE airco:BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer is a leaf node.

Description

A deployer of a biometric-categorisation system, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation AI Deployer"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A deployer of a biometric-categorisation system, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure ],
:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer .

Class: airco:BiometricData   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Input
    • airco:BiometricData
      • airco:FacialImageData

Description

Biometric data used as input to an AI system.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Input

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:BiometricData a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Data"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Biometric data used as input to an AI system."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Input> .

NOTE airco:CCTVFootage is a leaf node.

CCTV footage used as a data source.

https://w3id.org/dpv#SensitiveData | https://w3id.org/dpv#Data

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:CCTVFootage a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "CCTV Footage"@en ;
rdfs:comment "CCTV footage used as a data source."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/dpv#SensitiveData> .

Class: airco:Condition   back to top

  • owl:Thing
    • airco:Condition
      • airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation
      • airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope
      • airco:Condition_EditorialResponsibility
      • airco:Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride
      • airco:Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation
      • airco:Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset
      • airco:Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview
      • airco:Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure
      • airco:Condition_NotObviousAI
      • airco:Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment
      • airco:Condition_NotSystemic
      • airco:Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts
      • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms
      • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool
      • airco:Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct
      • airco:Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling
      • airco:Condition_TechnicalFeasibility
      • airco:Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment
      • airco:PreDeploymentCondition

Description

A condition that must be satisfied for a rule or exception to apply.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Range of:
airco:hasCondition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Condition"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A condition that must be satisfied for a rule or exception to apply."@en .

Class: airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation

NOTE airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation is a leaf node.

Description

AI Office may invite GPAI model providers, relevant national competent authorities to participate, while civil society, industry, academia, downstream providers, and independent experts may support the process.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Codes of Practice Participation Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 56(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI Office may invite GPAI model providers, relevant national competent authorities to participate, while civil society, industry, academia, downstream providers, and independent experts may support the process."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :AIOffice ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :DownstreamProvider :NationalCompetentAuthority :ScientificPanelOfExperts ) ] ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope

NOTE airco:Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope is a leaf node.

Description

Codes will cover but not necessarily be limited to: information in technical documentation for authorities and downstream providers, identification of type and nature of systemic risks and their sources, and modalities of risk management.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Codes of Practice Scope Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 56(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Codes will cover but not necessarily be limited to: information in technical documentation for authorities and downstream providers, identification of type and nature of systemic risks and their sources, and modalities of risk management."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#TechnicalDocumentation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#followsCodeOfConduct> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/airo#CodeOfConduct> ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_EditorialResponsibility   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_EditorialResponsibility

NOTE airco:Condition_EditorialResponsibility is a leaf node.

Description

A natural or legal person must hold editorial responsibility for the publication.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_EditorialResponsibility a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Editorial Responsibility Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A natural or legal person must hold editorial responsibility for the publication."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride

NOTE airco:Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride is a leaf node.

Description

The Commission may decide, on its own or via qualified alert from the scientific panel of independent experts, that a model has high impact capabilities, rendering it systemic.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High Impact Capabilities Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The Commission may decide, on its own or via qualified alert from the scientific panel of independent experts, that a model has high impact capabilities, rendering it systemic."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ScientificPanelOfExperts ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation

NOTE airco:Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation is a leaf node.

Description

AI must augment rather than replace human assessments.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Human Assessment Augmentation Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(e)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI must augment rather than replace human assessments."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset

NOTE airco:Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset is a leaf node.

Description

The biometric dataset must have been lawfully acquired.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Lawfully Acquired Dataset Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The biometric dataset must have been lawfully acquired."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasDataSource ;
owl:someValuesFrom :LawfullyAcquiredBiometricDataset ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview

NOTE airco:Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview is a leaf node.

Description

The AI-generated content must have undergone meaningful human editorial review.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Meaningful Human Review Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI-generated content must have undergone meaningful human editorial review."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure

NOTE airco:Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure is a leaf node.

Description

Disclosure must not hamper the display or enjoyment of the work.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Non-Hampering Disclosure Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Disclosure must not hamper the display or enjoyment of the work."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_NotObviousAI   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_NotObviousAI

NOTE airco:Condition_NotObviousAI is a leaf node.

Description

Applies unless it is obvious from the point of view of a reasonably well-informed, observant, and circumspect natural person.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_NotObviousAI a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Not Obviously AI Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Applies unless it is obvious from the point of view of a reasonably well-informed, observant, and circumspect natural person."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasSubjectInvolvement ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#InformedInvolvement> ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment

NOTE airco:Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system must not be meant to replace or influence the previously completed human assessment without proper human review.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Not Replacing Human Assessment Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system must not be meant to replace or influence the previously completed human assessment without proper human review."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_NotSystemic   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_NotSystemic

NOTE airco:Condition_NotSystemic is a leaf node.

Description

System must not present systemic risks.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_NotSystemic a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Not Systemic Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "System must not present systemic risks."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Class ;
owl:complementOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSystem ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIModel ] ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts

NOTE airco:Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts is a leaf node.

Description

Must be based on objective, verifiable facts directly linked to criminal activity.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Objective Verifiable Facts Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(e)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Must be based on objective, verifiable facts directly linked to criminal activity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ObjectiveVerifiableFact ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms

NOTE airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms is a leaf node.

Description

Using AI-enabled real-time remote biometric identification must account for affected persons' rights and freedoms.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Account for Rights and Freedoms Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Using AI-enabled real-time remote biometric identification must account for affected persons' rights and freedoms."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool

NOTE airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool is a leaf node.

Description

Real-time remote biometric identification is only allowed when not using the tool would cause considerable harm.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Considerable Harm Without Tool Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Real-time remote biometric identification is only allowed when not using the tool would cause considerable harm."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment   back to top

  • airco:PreDeploymentCondition
    • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment

NOTE airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

Police must complete a fundamental rights impact assessment before deployment of remote biometric identification.

Inherits from (2):
airco:PreDeploymentCondition | airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Police must complete a fundamental rights impact assessment before deployment of remote biometric identification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment ],
:PreDeploymentCondition .

Class: airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation   back to top

  • airco:PreDeploymentCondition
    • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation

NOTE airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation is a leaf node.

Description

Must obtain authorisation from a judicial authority or independent administrative authority before deployment of remote biometric identification.

Inherits from (2):
airco:PreDeploymentCondition | airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Obtain Authorisation Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Must obtain authorisation from a judicial authority or independent administrative authority before deployment of remote biometric identification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyAuthorisation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresAuthorisation ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :IndependentAdministrativeAuthority <https://w3id.org/vair#JudicialAuthority> ) ] ],
:PreDeploymentCondition .

Class: airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase   back to top

  • airco:PreDeploymentCondition
    • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase

NOTE airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase is a leaf node.

Description

The system must be registered in the EU database before deployment of remote biometric identification.

Inherits from (2):
airco:PreDeploymentCondition | airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Register in EU Database Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The system must be registered in the EU database before deployment of remote biometric identification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyRegistration ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :registersIn ;
owl:someValuesFrom :EUDatabase ],
:PreDeploymentCondition .

Class: airco:Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct

NOTE airco:Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system must be used as a safety component or be a product covered by EU laws in Annex I.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Safety Component or Product Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system must be used as a safety component or be a product covered by EU laws in Annex I."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling

NOTE airco:Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling is a leaf node.

Description

The assessment must be solely based on profiling or personality traits, without other evidence.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Solely Based on Profiling Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(e), Annex III, 6(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The assessment must be solely based on profiling or personality traits, without other evidence."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:allValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling> ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ],
:Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_TechnicalFeasibility   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_TechnicalFeasibility

NOTE airco:Condition_TechnicalFeasibility is a leaf node.

Description

Solutions must be effective, interoperable, robust, and reliable as far as technically feasible.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_TechnicalFeasibility a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Technical Feasibility Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Solutions must be effective, interoperable, robust, and reliable as far as technically feasible."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment

NOTE airco:Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

Must be required to undergo a third-party conformity assessment under Annex I laws.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Third-Party Conformity Assessment Condition"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Must be required to undergo a third-party conformity assessment under Annex I laws."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:CopyrightPolicy   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation
    • airco:CopyrightPolicy

NOTE airco:CopyrightPolicy is a leaf node.

Description

A policy established to respect the Copyright Directive.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:CopyrightPolicy a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Copyright Policy"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A policy established to respect the Copyright Directive."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation> .

Class: airco:CybersecurityProtection   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#SecurityMeasure
    • airco:CybersecurityProtection

NOTE airco:CybersecurityProtection is a leaf node.

Description

An adequate level of cybersecurity protection.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#SecurityMeasure | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:CybersecurityProtection a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Cybersecurity Protection"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An adequate level of cybersecurity protection."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#SecurityMeasure> .

Class: airco:DataGovernance   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl
    • airco:DataGovernance

NOTE airco:DataGovernance is a leaf node.

Description

Data governance measures ensuring training, validation, and testing datasets are relevant, representative, free of errors, and complete.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DataGovernance a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Data Governance"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Data governance measures ensuring training, validation, and testing datasets are relevant, representative, free of errors, and complete."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> .

Class: airco:Database   back to top

  • owl:Thing
    • airco:Database
      • airco:RegulatoryDatabase

Description

A structured repository for storing and retrieving data.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Range of:
airco:registersIn

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Database a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Database"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A structured repository for storing and retrieving data."@en .

Class: airco:DecisionPatternDetection   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability
    • airco:DecisionPatternDetection

NOTE airco:DecisionPatternDetection is a leaf node.

Description

The capability of an AI system to detect decision-making patterns or deviations from prior decision-making patterns, without replacing or influencing previously completed human assessments.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DecisionPatternDetection a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Decision Pattern Detection Capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of an AI system to detect decision-making patterns or deviations from prior decision-making patterns, without replacing or influencing previously completed human assessments."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PatternRecognition ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .

Class: airco:DeepFakeAIDeployer   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer
    • airco:DeepFakeAIDeployer

NOTE airco:DeepFakeAIDeployer is a leaf node.

Description

A deployer of an AI System generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DeepFakeAIDeployer a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Deep Fake AI Deployer"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A deployer of an AI System generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure ],
:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer .

Class: airco:DeepFakeGeneration   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration
    • airco:DeepFakeGeneration

NOTE airco:DeepFakeGeneration is a leaf node.

Description

Purpose of generating or manipulating image, audio, or video content constituting a deep fake.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DeepFakeGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Deep Fake Generation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Purpose of generating or manipulating image, audio, or video content constituting a deep fake."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToContentType ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :SyntheticAudioContent :SyntheticImageContent :SyntheticVideoContent ) ] ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration> .

Class: airco:DisabilityVulnerability   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability
    • airco:DisabilityVulnerability

NOTE airco:DisabilityVulnerability is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DisabilityVulnerability a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Disability Vulnerability"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability> .

Class: airco:DisclosureRequirement   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyObligation
    • airco:DisclosureRequirement
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure

Description

A requirement to disclose AI involvement to affected persons.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DisclosureRequirement a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Disclosure Requirement"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A requirement to disclose AI involvement to affected persons."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyRiskCategory ],
:TransparencyObligation .

Class: airco:DownstreamProvider   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider
    • airco:DownstreamProvider

NOTE airco:DownstreamProvider is a leaf node.

Description

A provider of an AI system, including a general-purpose AI system, which integrates an AI model, regardless of whether the AI model is provided by themselves and vertically integrated or provided by another entity based on contractual relations.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DownstreamProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Downstream Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 3(68)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A provider of an AI system, including a general-purpose AI system, which integrates an AI model, regardless of whether the AI model is provided by themselves and vertically integrated or provided by another entity based on contractual relations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider> .

Class: airco:DownstreamProviderDocumentation   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation
    • airco:DownstreamProviderDocumentation

NOTE airco:DownstreamProviderDocumentation is a leaf node.

Description

Information and documentation supplied to downstream providers to understand capabilities and limitations.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:DownstreamProviderDocumentation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Downstream Provider Documentation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Information and documentation supplied to downstream providers to understand capabilities and limitations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation> .

Class: airco:EUDatabase   back to top

  • airco:RegulatoryDatabase
    • airco:EUDatabase

NOTE airco:EUDatabase is a leaf node.

Description

The EU database in which high-risk AI systems and real-time remote biometric identification systems must be registered before deployment.

Inherits from (2):
airco:RegulatoryDatabase | airco:Database

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:EUDatabase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "EU Database"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The EU database in which high-risk AI systems and real-time remote biometric identification systems must be registered before deployment."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :RegulatoryDatabase .

Class: airco:EmotionInferenceInEducation   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState
    • airco:EmotionInferenceInEducation

NOTE airco:EmotionInferenceInEducation is a leaf node.

Description

Purpose of inferring emotions specifically in educational institution contexts.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState | https://w3id.org/vair#Detection | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:EmotionInferenceInEducation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Inference In Education"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Purpose of inferring emotions specifically in educational institution contexts."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToLocality ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EducationalSetting> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Student> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState> .

Class: airco:EmotionInferenceInWorkplace   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState
    • airco:EmotionInferenceInWorkplace

NOTE airco:EmotionInferenceInWorkplace is a leaf node.

Description

Purpose of inferring emotions specifically in workplace contexts.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState | https://w3id.org/vair#Detection | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:EmotionInferenceInWorkplace a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Inference In Workplace"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Purpose of inferring emotions specifically in workplace contexts."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToLocality ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Workplace> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Employee> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingEmotionalState> .

Class: airco:EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer
    • airco:EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer

NOTE airco:EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer is a leaf node.

Description

A deployer of an emotion-recognition system, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Recognition AI Deployer"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A deployer of an emotion-recognition system, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure ],
:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer .

    • airco:EnvironmentalCrime

airco:SeriousCrime

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

:EnvironmentalCrime a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Environmental Crime"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SeriousCrime .

    • airco:Exception

Description

An exception to a rule under the AI Act.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
airco:isExceptionTo

Property Range of:
airco:hasException

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Exception"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An exception to a rule under the AI Act."@en .

Class: airco:Exception_ArtisticFictionalWork   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_ArtisticFictionalWork

NOTE airco:Exception_ArtisticFictionalWork is a leaf node.

Description

For artistic, creative, satirical, fictional, or analogous works, transparency is limited to disclosure that does not hamper the display or enjoyment of the work.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_ArtisticFictionalWork a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Artistic, Fictional, or Satirical Work Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "For artistic, creative, satirical, fictional, or analogous works, transparency is limited to disclosure that does not hamper the display or enjoyment of the work."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_NonHamperingDisclosure ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_AssistiveEditing   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_AssistiveEditing

NOTE airco:Exception_AssistiveEditing is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for AI systems that perform an assistive function for standard editing.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_AssistiveEditing a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Assistive Editing Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for AI systems that perform an assistive function for standard editing."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_AugmentingHumanAssessment   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_AugmentingHumanAssessment

NOTE airco:Exception_AugmentingHumanAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

Exception when used to augment human assessments based on objective, verifiable facts directly linked to criminal activity.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_AugmentingHumanAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Augmenting Human Assessments Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(e)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception when used to augment human assessments based on objective, verifiable facts directly linked to criminal activity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_HumanAssessmentAugmentation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_ObjectiveVerifiableFacts ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_BiometricVerification   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_BiometricVerification

NOTE airco:Exception_BiometricVerification is a leaf node.

Description

Biometric verification that confirms a person is who they claim to be is excluded.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_BiometricVerification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Verification Exclusion"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 1(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Biometric verification that confirms a person is who they claim to be is excluded."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement

NOTE airco:Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for AI systems authorised by law for detecting, preventing, investigating, or prosecuting criminal offences, subject to appropriate safeguards.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Criminal Law Enforcement Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for AI systems authorised by law for detecting, preventing, investigating, or prosecuting criminal offences, subject to appropriate safeguards."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingCriminalOffences> <https://w3id.org/vair#InvestigatingCriminalOffences> <https://w3id.org/vair#ProsecutingCriminalOffences> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_PublicCrimeReporting ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_DetectsPatterns   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskException
    • airco:Exception_DetectsPatterns

NOTE airco:Exception_DetectsPatterns is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system detects decision-making patterns or deviations from prior decision-making patterns and is not meant to replace or influence the previously completed human assessment without proper human review.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskException | airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_DetectsPatterns a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Detects Decision-Making Patterns Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system detects decision-making patterns or deviations from prior decision-making patterns and is not meant to replace or influence the previously completed human assessment without proper human review."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom :DecisionPatternDetection ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_NotReplacingHumanAssessment ],
:HighRiskException .

Class: airco:Exception_FinancialFraudDetection   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_FinancialFraudDetection

NOTE airco:Exception_FinancialFraudDetection is a leaf node.

Description

Exception when the creditworthiness evaluation is used for detecting financial fraud.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_FinancialFraudDetection a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Financial Fraud Detection Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 5(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception when the creditworthiness evaluation is used for detecting financial fraud."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom :FinancialFraudDetection ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI

NOTE airco:Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI is a leaf node.

Description

Free and open licence GPAI models only need to comply with the Copyright Policy and Training Summary obligations, unless the model is systemic.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Free Open Licence AI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Free and open licence GPAI models only need to comply with the Copyright Policy and Training Summary obligations, unless the model is systemic."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_NotSystemic ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:allValuesFrom :FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSystem ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_HumanEditorialReview   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_HumanEditorialReview

NOTE airco:Exception_HumanEditorialReview is a leaf node.

Description

Exception where the AI-generated content has undergone meaningful human editorial review and a natural or legal person holds editorial responsibility for the publication.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_HumanEditorialReview a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Human Editorial Review Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception where the AI-generated content has undergone meaningful human editorial review and a natural or legal person holds editorial responsibility for the publication."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_EditorialResponsibility ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_MeaningfulHumanReview ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_ImprovesHumanResult   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskException
    • airco:Exception_ImprovesHumanResult

NOTE airco:Exception_ImprovesHumanResult is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system improves the result of a previously completed human activity.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskException | airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_ImprovesHumanResult a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Improves Human Result Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system improves the result of a previously completed human activity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HumanResultImprovement ],
:HighRiskException .

Class: airco:Exception_LabellingFilteringLawfulDatasets   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_LabellingFilteringLawfulDatasets

NOTE airco:Exception_LabellingFilteringLawfulDatasets is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for labelling or filtering of lawfully acquired biometric datasets.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_LabellingFilteringLawfulDatasets a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Labelling or Filtering Lawfully Acquired Datasets Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for labelling or filtering of lawfully acquired biometric datasets."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_LawfullyAcquiredDataset ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_LawEnforcementBiometricCategorisation   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_LawEnforcementBiometricCategorisation

NOTE airco:Exception_LawEnforcementBiometricCategorisation is a leaf node.

Description

Exception when law enforcement categorises biometric data.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_LawEnforcementBiometricCategorisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Law Enforcement Biometric Categorisation Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception when law enforcement categorises biometric data."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_MedicalReasons   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_MedicalReasons

NOTE airco:Exception_MedicalReasons is a leaf node.

Description

Exception when AI action (e.g. emotion inference) is performed for medical reasons.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_MedicalReasons a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Medical Reasons Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(g)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception when AI action (e.g. emotion inference) is performed for medical reasons."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :affectsArea ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Health> ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_NarrowProceduralTask   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskException
    • airco:Exception_NarrowProceduralTask

NOTE airco:Exception_NarrowProceduralTask is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system performs a narrow procedural task.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskException | airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_NarrowProceduralTask a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Narrow Procedural Task Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system performs a narrow procedural task."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom :NarrowProceduralTask ],
:HighRiskException .

Class: airco:Exception_NoSubstantialAlteration   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_NoSubstantialAlteration

NOTE airco:Exception_NoSubstantialAlteration is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for AI systems that do not substantially alter the input data provided by the deployer or the semantics thereof.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_NoSubstantialAlteration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "No Substantial Alteration Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for AI systems that do not substantially alter the input data provided by the deployer or the semantics thereof."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_PoliticalCampaignTools   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_PoliticalCampaignTools

NOTE airco:Exception_PoliticalCampaignTools is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for AI outputs that do not directly interact with people, like tools used to organise, optimise, and structure political campaigns.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_PoliticalCampaignTools a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Political Campaign Tool Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 8(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for AI outputs that do not directly interact with people, like tools used to organise, optimise, and structure political campaigns."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PoliticalCampaignOrganisation ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_PreparatoryTask   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskException
    • airco:Exception_PreparatoryTask

NOTE airco:Exception_PreparatoryTask is a leaf node.

Description

The AI system performs a preparatory task to an assessment relevant for the purpose of the Annex III use cases.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskException | airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_PreparatoryTask a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Preparatory Task Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI system performs a preparatory task to an assessment relevant for the purpose of the Annex III use cases."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PreparatoryTask ],
:HighRiskException .

Class: airco:Exception_ProfilingOverride   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_ProfilingOverride

NOTE airco:Exception_ProfilingOverride is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems listed under Annex III are always considered high risk if they profile individuals, i.e. automated processing of personal data to assess various aspects of a person's life.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_ProfilingOverride a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Profiling Always High-Risk Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems listed under Annex III are always considered high risk if they profile individuals, i.e. automated processing of personal data to assess various aspects of a person's life."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :isExceptionTo ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskException ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_PublicCrimeReporting   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_PublicCrimeReporting

NOTE airco:Exception_PublicCrimeReporting is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for when systems are available for the public to report a criminal offence.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_PublicCrimeReporting a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Crime Reporting Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for when systems are available for the public to report a criminal offence."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ImminentThreat   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ImminentThreat

NOTE airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ImminentThreat is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for preventing substantial and imminent threat to life, or foreseeable terrorist attack.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ImminentThreat a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Preventing Imminent Threat to Life or Terrorist Attack RBI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(h)(ii)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for preventing substantial and imminent threat to life, or foreseeable terrorist attack."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_MissingPersons   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_MissingPersons

NOTE airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_MissingPersons is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for searching for missing persons, abduction victims, and people who have been human trafficked or sexually exploited.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_MissingPersons a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Searching Missing Persons RBI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(h)(i)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for searching for missing persons, abduction victims, and people who have been human trafficked or sexually exploited."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :AbductionVictim :MissingPerson :SexualExploitationVictim :TraffickingVictim ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_SeriousCrimeSuspects   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_SeriousCrimeSuspects

NOTE airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_SeriousCrimeSuspects is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for identifying suspects in serious crimes.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_SeriousCrimeSuspects a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Identifying Suspects in Serious Crimes RBI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(h)(iii)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for identifying suspects in serious crimes."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Suspect ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_AccountForRightsAndFreedoms ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ConsiderableHarmWithoutTool ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :includesCrimeType ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SeriousCrime ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyAuthorisation   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyAuthorisation

NOTE airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyAuthorisation is a leaf node.

Description

In duly justified cases of urgency, deployment of remote biometric identification can commence without authorisation, provided that authorisation is requested within 24 hours. If rejected, deployment must cease immediately, deleting all data, results, and outputs.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyAuthorisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Urgency Authorisation RBI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "In duly justified cases of urgency, deployment of remote biometric identification can commence without authorisation, provided that authorisation is requested within 24 hours. If rejected, deployment must cease immediately, deleting all data, results, and outputs."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyRegistration   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyRegistration

NOTE airco:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyRegistration is a leaf node.

Description

In duly justified cases of urgency, deployment of remote biometric identification can commence without registration, provided that it is registered later without undue delay.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_UrgencyRegistration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Urgency Registration RBI Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "In duly justified cases of urgency, deployment of remote biometric identification can commence without registration, provided that it is registered later without undue delay."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_SafetyReasons   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_SafetyReasons

NOTE airco:Exception_SafetyReasons is a leaf node.

Description

Exception when AI action (e.g. emotion inference) is performed for safety reasons.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_SafetyReasons a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Safety Reasons Exception"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(g)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception when AI action (e.g. emotion inference) is performed for safety reasons."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :affectsArea ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Safety> ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:Exception_TravelDocumentVerification   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:Exception_TravelDocumentVerification

NOTE airco:Exception_TravelDocumentVerification is a leaf node.

Description

Exception for verifying travel documents.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Exception_TravelDocumentVerification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Travel Document Verification Exclusion"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 7(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Exception for verifying travel documents."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#VerifyingAuthenticityOfTravelDocument> ],
:Exception .

    • airco:FacialImageData

Description

Facial image data.

airco:BiometricData | https://w3id.org/airo#Input

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:FacialImageData a owl:Class ;
