Class: airco:FinancialFraudDetection   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#Detection
    • airco:FinancialFraudDetection

NOTE airco:FinancialFraudDetection is a leaf node.

Description

Detection of financial fraud, which exempts creditworthiness evaluation from high-risk classification.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#Detection | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:FinancialFraudDetection a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Financial Fraud Detection"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Detection of financial fraud, which exempts creditworthiness evaluation from high-risk classification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PrivateService> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#Detection> .

Class: airco:FreeOpenLicence   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#License
    • airco:FreeOpenLicence

NOTE airco:FreeOpenLicence is a leaf node.

Description

A free and open licence under which model parameters, weights, architecture, and usage are publicly available, allowing access, usage, modification, and distribution.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#License

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:FreeOpenLicence a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Free and Open Licence"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A free and open licence under which model parameters, weights, architecture, and usage are publicly available, allowing access, usage, modification, and distribution."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#License> .

Class: airco:FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel
    • airco:FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel

NOTE airco:FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel is a leaf node.

Description

A GPAI model whose parameters, weights, architecture, and usage are publicly available.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Free and Open Licence GPAI Model"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A GPAI model whose parameters, weights, architecture, and usage are publicly available."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIRiskCategory ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasLicense> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :FreeOpenLicence ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIProvider ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> .

Class: airco:FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation
    • airco:FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment

NOTE airco:FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

A fundamental rights impact assessment required before deployment of real-time RemoteBiometricIdentification.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A fundamental rights impact assessment required before deployment of real-time RemoteBiometricIdentification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation> .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation   back to top

  • airco:Obligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation
      • airco:GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration
      • airco:GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk
      • airco:GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy
      • airco:GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo
      • airco:GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation
      • airco:GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary
      • airco:SystemicRiskObligation

Description

An obligation placed on providers of GPAI models.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An obligation placed on providers of GPAI models."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIRiskCategory ],
:Obligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration is a leaf node.

Description

All GPAI model providers may demonstrate compliance by voluntarily adhering to a code of practice until European harmonised standards are published. Providers that don't adhere must demonstrate alternative adequate means of compliance for Commission approval.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Compliance Demonstration via Codes of Practice Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 56"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All GPAI model providers may demonstrate compliance by voluntarily adhering to a code of practice until European harmonised standards are published. Providers that don't adhere must demonstrate alternative adequate means of compliance for Commission approval."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_CodesOfPracticeParticipation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_CodesOfPracticeScope ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#followsCodeOfConduct> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/airo#CodeOfConduct> ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk is a leaf node.

Description

GPAI system providers should cooperate with high-risk AI system providers to enable the latter's compliance.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Cooperation with High-Risk AI Providers Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "GPAI system providers should cooperate with high-risk AI system providers to enable the latter's compliance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskAIProvider ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of GPAI models must establish a policy to respect the Copyright Directive.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Copyright Policy Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of GPAI models must establish a policy to respect the Copyright Directive."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :CopyrightPolicy ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :CopyrightDirective ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity   back to top

  • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of systemic GPAI models must ensure an adequate level of cybersecurity protection.

Inherits from (3):
airco:SystemicRiskObligation | airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Cybersecurity Protection Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 55(1)(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of systemic GPAI models must ensure an adequate level of cybersecurity protection."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :CybersecurityProtection ],
:SystemicRiskObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of GPAI models must draw up information and documentation to supply to downstream providers that intend to integrate the GPAI model into their own AI system, so the latter understands capabilities and limitations and is enabled to comply.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Downstream Provider Information Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of GPAI models must draw up information and documentation to supply to downstream providers that intend to integrate the GPAI model into their own AI system, so the latter understands capabilities and limitations and is enabled to comply."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :DownstreamProviderDocumentation ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation   back to top

  • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of systemic GPAI models must perform model evaluations, including conducting and documenting adversarial testing to identify and mitigate systemic risk.

Inherits from (3):
airco:SystemicRiskObligation | airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Model Evaluation for Systemic Risk Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 55(1)(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of systemic GPAI models must perform model evaluations, including conducting and documenting adversarial testing to identify and mitigate systemic risk."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ModelEvaluation ],
:SystemicRiskObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting   back to top

  • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of systemic GPAI models must track, document, and report serious incidents and possible corrective measures to the AI Office and relevant national competent authorities without undue delay.

Inherits from (3):
airco:SystemicRiskObligation | airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Serious Incident Reporting Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 55(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of systemic GPAI models must track, document, and report serious incidents and possible corrective measures to the AI Office and relevant national competent authorities without undue delay."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :AIOffice ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SeriousIncidentReporting ],
:SystemicRiskObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation   back to top

  • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of systemic GPAI models must assess and mitigate possible systemic risks, including their sources.

Inherits from (3):
airco:SystemicRiskObligation | airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Systemic-Risk Assessment and Mitigation Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 55(1)(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of systemic GPAI models must assess and mitigate possible systemic risks, including their sources."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SystemicRiskObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification   back to top

  • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of systemic GPAI models must notify the Commission if their model meets the systemic risk criterion within 2 weeks.

Inherits from (3):
airco:SystemicRiskObligation | airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Systemic-Risk Notification Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of systemic GPAI models must notify the Commission if their model meets the systemic risk criterion within 2 weeks."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SystemicRiskObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of GPAI models must draw up technical documentation, including training and testing process and evaluation results.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Technical Documentation Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of GPAI models must draw up technical documentation, including training and testing process and evaluation results."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_FreeOpenLicenceGPAI ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#TechnicalDocumentation> ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary

NOTE airco:GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary is a leaf node.

Description

All providers of GPAI models must publish a sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training the GPAI model.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Training Summary Publication Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "All providers of GPAI models must publish a sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training the GPAI model."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TrainingSummary ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:GPAIProvider   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider
    • airco:GPAIProvider
      • airco:SystemicRiskGPAIProvider

Description

A provider of a GPAI model subject to all standard GPAI obligations: technical documentation, information and documentation to supply to downstream
providers, respect the Copyright Directive, sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training .

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)" ;
rdfs:comment """A provider of a GPAI model subject to all standard GPAI obligations: technical documentation, information and documentation to supply to downstream
providers, respect the Copyright Directive, sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training ."""@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_ComplianceDemonstration ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_CooperateWithHighRisk ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_TechnicalDocumentation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider> .

Class: airco:GPAIRiskCategory   back to top

  • airco:RiskCategory
    • airco:GPAIRiskCategory

NOTE airco:GPAIRiskCategory is a leaf node.

Description

The General Purpose AI Risk category in the AI Act relating to obligations and risks in GPAI systems.

Inherits from (2):
airco:RiskCategory | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAIRiskCategory a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "GPAI Risk Category"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Chapter V, Articles 51-56"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The General Purpose AI Risk category in the AI Act relating to obligations and risks in GPAI systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggeredByRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> ],
:RiskCategory .

Class: airco:GPAISystemicRisk   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#SystemRiskSource
    • airco:GPAISystemicRisk
      • airco:HighComputeTraining
      • airco:HighImpactCapability

Description

A systemic risk posed by a GPAI model.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/vair#SystemRiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GPAISystemicRisk a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Systemic Risk"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A systemic risk posed by a GPAI model."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#isRiskSourceFor> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIModel ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#SystemRiskSource> .

Class: airco:GeneratingTextContent   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration
    • airco:GeneratingTextContent
      • airco:PublicInterestTextGeneration

Description

Purpose of generating synthetic text content.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:GeneratingTextContent a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Generating Text Content"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Purpose of generating synthetic text content."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToContentType ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SyntheticTextContent ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration> .

Class: airco:HighComputeTraining   back to top

  • airco:GPAISystemicRisk
    • airco:HighComputeTraining

NOTE airco:HighComputeTraining is a leaf node.

Description

Indicates that the GPAI model was trained using compute exceeding the systemic-risk threshold (10^25 FLOPs).

Inherits from (4):
airco:GPAISystemicRisk | https://w3id.org/vair#SystemRiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighComputeTraining a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Compute Training"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates that the GPAI model was trained using compute exceeding the systemic-risk threshold (10^25 FLOPs)."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue "10^25 FLOPs" ;
owl:onProperty :hasComputeThreshold ],
:GPAISystemicRisk .

Class: airco:HighImpactCapability   back to top

  • airco:GPAISystemicRisk
    • airco:HighImpactCapability

NOTE airco:HighImpactCapability is a leaf node.

Description

Indicates that a GPAI model has high impact capabilities evaluated on the basis of appropriate technical tools and methodologies, including indicators and benchmarks.

Inherits from (4):
airco:GPAISystemicRisk | https://w3id.org/vair#SystemRiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighImpactCapability a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Impact Capability"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51(1)(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates that a GPAI model has high impact capabilities evaluated on the basis of appropriate technical tools and methodologies, including indicators and benchmarks."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :GPAISystemicRisk .

Class: airco:HighRiskAIProvider   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider
    • airco:HighRiskAIProvider

NOTE airco:HighRiskAIProvider is a leaf node.

Description

A provider of a high-risk AI system, subject to obligations regarding high-risk systems.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk AI Provider"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A provider of a high-risk AI system, subject to obligations regarding high-risk systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider> .

Class: airco:HighRiskCategory   back to top

  • airco:RiskCategory
    • airco:HighRiskCategory

NOTE airco:HighRiskCategory is a leaf node.

Description

The High-Risk category in the AI Act relating to high-risk AI systems.

Inherits from (2):
airco:RiskCategory | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskCategory a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk Category"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Chapter III, Articles 6-27, Annex III"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The High-Risk category in the AI Act relating to high-risk AI systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggeredByRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskUseCase ],
:RiskCategory .

Class: airco:HighRiskException   back to top

  • airco:Exception
    • airco:HighRiskException
      • airco:Exception_DetectsPatterns
      • airco:Exception_ImprovesHumanResult
      • airco:Exception_NarrowProceduralTask
      • airco:Exception_PreparatoryTask

Description

A criterion that may exempt an AI system from high-risk classification under Annex III. These exceptions are overridden when profiling is involved.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Exception

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskException a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk Exception Criterion"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A criterion that may exempt an AI system from high-risk classification under Annex III. These exceptions are overridden when profiling is involved."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_ProfilingOverride ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :isExceptionTo ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII ],
:Exception .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation   back to top

  • airco:Obligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem
      • airco:HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation

Description

An obligation placed on providers of high-risk AI systems.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Articles 6, 8-17"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An obligation placed on providers of high-risk AI systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskCategory ],
:Obligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system to achieve appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_AccuracyRobustnessCybersecurity a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Accuracy, Robustness, and Cybersecurity Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 15"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system to achieve appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must conduct data governance ensuring that training, validation, and testing datasets are relevant, sufficiently representative, and to the best extent possible, free of errors and complete according to the intended purpose.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_DataGovernance a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Data Governance Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 10"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must conduct data governance ensuring that training, validation, and testing datasets are relevant, sufficiently representative, and to the best extent possible, free of errors and complete according to the intended purpose."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :DataGovernance ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

Providers whose AI system falls under Annex III use cases but believes it is not high risk must document such an assessment before placing it on the market or putting it into service.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_DocumentNonHighRiskAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Document Non-High-Risk Assessment Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Providers whose AI system falls under Annex III use cases but believes it is not high risk must document such an assessment before placing it on the market or putting it into service."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system to allow deployers to implement human oversight.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_HumanOversight a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Human Oversight Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 14"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system to allow deployers to implement human oversight."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#HumanOversightMeasure> ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must provide instructions for use to downstream deployers to enable the latter's compliance.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_InstructionsForUse a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Instructions for Use Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 13"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must provide instructions for use to downstream deployers to enable the latter's compliance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#InstructionForUse> ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must establish a quality management system to ensure compliance.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_QualityManagementSystem a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Quality Management System Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 17"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must establish a quality management system to ensure compliance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :QualityManagementSystem ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system for record-keeping to enable automatic recording of events relevant for identifying national-level risks and substantial modifications throughout the system's lifecycle.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_RecordKeeping a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Record-Keeping Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 12"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must design their high-risk AI system for record-keeping to enable automatic recording of events relevant for identifying national-level risks and substantial modifications throughout the system's lifecycle."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :RecordKeepingCapability ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must establish a risk management system throughout the high-risk AI system's lifecycle.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_RiskManagementSystem a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Risk Management System Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 9"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must establish a risk management system throughout the high-risk AI system's lifecycle."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom :RiskManagementSystem ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskObligation
    • airco:HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation

NOTE airco:HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation is a leaf node.

Description

High-risk AI providers must draw up technical documentation to demonstrate compliance and provide authorities with the information to assess that compliance.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskObligation_TechnicalDocumentation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Technical Documentation Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 11"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-risk AI providers must draw up technical documentation to demonstrate compliance and provide authorities with the information to assess that compliance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresDocumentation ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#TechnicalDocumentation> ],
:HighRiskObligation .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase   back to top

  • airco:UseCase
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase
      • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_SafetyComponentAnnexI

Description

High-Risk AI practice.

Inherits from (1):
airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
rdfs:comment "High-Risk AI practice."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskCategory ],
:UseCase .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCase
    • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_Creditworthiness
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_CrimeVictimRisk
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_CriticalInfrastructureSafety
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EducationAccess
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmergencyCallClassification
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmploymentDecisions
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvaluatingLearningOutcomes
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvidenceReliability
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_InfluencingElections
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_InsuranceRiskAssessment
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_JusticeResearchAndApplication
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationApplications
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationIdentification
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationRisk
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_OffendingReoffendingRisk
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_Polygraphs_LawEnforcement
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_Polygraphs_Migration
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_ProfilingInCrime
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_ProhibitedStudentBehaviour
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_PublicBenefitsEligibility
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_RecruitmentSelection
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase_RemoteBiometricIdentification

Description

AI systems listed under Annex III use cases are high risk, subject to exceptions.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "High-Risk Use Case under Annex III Legislation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(2), Annex III"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems listed under Annex III use cases are high risk, subject to exceptions."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_DetectsPatterns :Exception_ImprovesHumanResult :Exception_NarrowProceduralTask :Exception_PreparatoryTask ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCase .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel is a leaf node.

Description

Assessing the appropriate level of education for an individual.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Assessing Appropriate Level of Education High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 3(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Assessing the appropriate level of education for an individual."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Education> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingAccessibleLevelOfEducation> <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingLevelOfEducation> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive is a leaf node.

Description

Biometric categorisation systems inferring sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation Inferring Sensitive Attributes High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 1(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Biometric categorisation systems inferring sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricCategorisation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom :BiometricData ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :infersSensitiveAttribute ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( :SensitiveAttribute [ a owl:Class ;
owl:complementOf [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :PhilosophicalBeliefs :PoliticalOpinions :Race :ReligiousBeliefs :SexLife :SexualOrientation :TradeUnionMembership ) ] ] ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_Creditworthiness   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_Creditworthiness

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_Creditworthiness is a leaf node.

Description

Evaluating creditworthiness, except when detecting financial fraud.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_Creditworthiness a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Creditworthiness Evaluation High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 5(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Evaluating creditworthiness, except when detecting financial fraud."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PrivateService> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingCreditworthiness> <https://w3id.org/vair#DeterminingCreditScore> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_FinancialFraudDetection ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_CrimeVictimRisk   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_CrimeVictimRisk

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_CrimeVictimRisk is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems used to assess an individual's risk of becoming a crime victim.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_CrimeVictimRisk a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Crime Victim Risk Assessment High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 6(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems used to assess an individual's risk of becoming a crime victim."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingRiskOfBecomingVictimOfCrime> ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_CriticalInfrastructureSafety   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_CriticalInfrastructureSafety

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_CriticalInfrastructureSafety is a leaf node.

Description

Safety components in the management and operation of critical digital infrastructure, road traffic, and the supply of water, gas, heating, and electricity.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_CriticalInfrastructureSafety a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Critical Infrastructure Safety Components High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 2"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Safety components in the management and operation of critical digital infrastructure, road traffic, and the supply of water, gas, heating, and electricity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#CriticalInfrastructure> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#ServingSafetyFunctionInManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#ServingSafetyFunctionInOperation> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EducationAccess   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EducationAccess

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EducationAccess is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems determining access, admission, or assignment to educational and vocational training institutions at all levels.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EducationAccess a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Education Access, Admission, and Assignment High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 3(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems determining access, admission, or assignment to educational and vocational training institutions at all levels."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Education> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AssigningPersonsToEducationalInstitutions> <https://w3id.org/vair#AssigningPersonsToVocationalTrainingInstitutions> <https://w3id.org/vair#DeterminingAccessToEducationalInstitutions> <https://w3id.org/vair#DeterminingAccessToVocationalTrainingInstitutions> <https://w3id.org/vair#DeterminingAdmissionToEducationalInstitutions> <https://w3id.org/vair#DeterminingAdmissionToVocationalTrainingInstitutions> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#CourseAttendee> <https://w3id.org/vair#Student> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmergencyCallClassification   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmergencyCallClassification

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmergencyCallClassification is a leaf node.

Description

Evaluating and classifying emergency calls, including dispatch prioritising of police, firefighters, medical aid and urgent patient triage services.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EmergencyCallClassification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emergency Call Evaluation and Classification High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 5(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Evaluating and classifying emergency calls, including dispatch prioritising of police, firefighters, medical aid and urgent patient triage services."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :UrgentPatientTriage <https://w3id.org/vair#ClassifyingEmergencyCall> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingEmergencyCall> <https://w3id.org/vair#PrioritisationOfEmergencyService> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#EmergencyHealthCareProvider> <https://w3id.org/vair#FireBrigade> <https://w3id.org/vair#MedicalAidProvider> <https://w3id.org/vair#Police> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition is a leaf node.

Description

Emotion recognition systems.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Recognition High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 1(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Emotion recognition systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EmotionRecognition> ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmploymentDecisions   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmploymentDecisions

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EmploymentDecisions is a leaf node.

Description

Promotion and termination of contracts, allocating tasks based on personality traits or characteristics and behaviour, and monitoring and evaluating performance.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EmploymentDecisions a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Promotion, Termination, Task Allocation, and Performance Monitoring High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 4(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Promotion and termination of contracts, allocating tasks based on personality traits or characteristics and behaviour, and monitoring and evaluating performance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Employment> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToLocality ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Workplace> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AllocatingTasks> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingEmployeeBehaviour> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingEmployeePerformance> <https://w3id.org/vair#MakingContractTerminationDecision> <https://w3id.org/vair#MakingPromotionDecision> <https://w3id.org/vair#MonitoringEmployeeBehaviour> <https://w3id.org/vair#MonitoringEmployeePerformance> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Employee> ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvaluatingLearningOutcomes   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvaluatingLearningOutcomes

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvaluatingLearningOutcomes is a leaf node.

Description

Evaluating learning outcomes, including those used to steer the student's learning process.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EvaluatingLearningOutcomes a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Evaluating Learning Outcomes"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 3(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Evaluating learning outcomes, including those used to steer the student's learning process."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Education> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToLocality ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EducationalSetting> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingLearningOutcomes> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Student> ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvidenceReliability   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvidenceReliability

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_EvidenceReliability is a leaf node.

Description

Evaluating evidence reliability during criminal investigations or prosecutions.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_EvidenceReliability a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Evidence Reliability Evaluation High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 6(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Evaluating evidence reliability during criminal investigations or prosecutions."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingReliabilityOfEvidenceInInvestigationOfCriminalOffences> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingReliabilityOfEvidenceInProsecutionOfCriminalOffences> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_InfluencingElections   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_InfluencingElections

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_InfluencingElections is a leaf node.

Description

Influencing elections and referenda outcomes or voting behaviour, excluding outputs that do not directly interact with people.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_InfluencingElections a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Influencing Elections, Referenda, and Voting Behaviour High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 8(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Influencing elections and referenda outcomes or voting behaviour, excluding outputs that do not directly interact with people."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#AdministrationOfDemocraticProcesses> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#InfluencingElectionOutcome> <https://w3id.org/vair#InfluencingReferendumOutcome> <https://w3id.org/vair#InfluencingVotingBehaviour> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_PoliticalCampaignTools ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_InsuranceRiskAssessment   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_InsuranceRiskAssessment

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_InsuranceRiskAssessment is a leaf node.

Description

Risk assessments and pricing in health and life insurance.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_InsuranceRiskAssessment a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Health and Life Insurance Risk Assessment and Pricing High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 5(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Risk assessments and pricing in health and life insurance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#HealthInsurancePricing> <https://w3id.org/vair#HealthInsuranceRiskAssessment> <https://w3id.org/vair#LifeInsurancePricing> <https://w3id.org/vair#LifeInsuranceRiskAssessment> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_JusticeResearchAndApplication   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_JusticeResearchAndApplication

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_JusticeResearchAndApplication is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems used in researching and interpreting facts and applying the law to concrete facts, or used in alternative dispute resolution.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_JusticeResearchAndApplication a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Justice Research and Application of Law High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 8(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems used in researching and interpreting facts and applying the law to concrete facts, or used in alternative dispute resolution."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#AdministrationOfJustice> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :AlternativeDisputeResolution <https://w3id.org/vair#ApplyingTheLawToFacts> <https://w3id.org/vair#InterpretingFacts> <https://w3id.org/vair#InterpretingLaw> <https://w3id.org/vair#ResearchingFacts> <https://w3id.org/vair#SettlingDispute> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationApplications   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationApplications

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationApplications is a leaf node.

Description

Examination of applications for asylum, visa, and residence permits, and associated complaints related to eligibility.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationApplications a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Migration Application Examination High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 7(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Examination of applications for asylum, visa, and residence permits, and associated complaints related to eligibility."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AsylumManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#BorderControlManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#MigrationManagement> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#ExaminingAsylumApplication> <https://w3id.org/vair#ExaminingMigrationRelatedComplaints> <https://w3id.org/vair#ExaminingResidencePermitsApplication> <https://w3id.org/vair#ExaminingVisaApplication> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AsylumSeeker> <https://w3id.org/vair#ResidencePermitApplicant> <https://w3id.org/vair#VisaApplicant> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationIdentification   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationIdentification

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Detecting, recognising, or identifying individuals in migration context, except verifying travel documents.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationIdentification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Migration Identification of Individuals High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 7(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Detecting, recognising, or identifying individuals in migration context, except verifying travel documents."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AsylumManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#BorderControlManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#MigrationManagement> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#DetectingIndividuals> <https://w3id.org/vair#IdentiftyingIndividuals> <https://w3id.org/vair#RecognisingIndividuals> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_TravelDocumentVerification ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationRisk   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationRisk

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationRisk is a leaf node.

Description

Assessments of irregular migration or health risks.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_MigrationRisk a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Irregular Migration or Health Risk Assessment High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 7(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Assessments of irregular migration or health risks."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AsylumManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#BorderControlManagement> <https://w3id.org/vair#MigrationManagement> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingHealthRisk> <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingRiskOfIrregularImmigration> <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingSecurityRisk> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_OffendingReoffendingRisk   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_OffendingReoffendingRisk

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_OffendingReoffendingRisk is a leaf node.

Description

Assessing an individual's risk of offending or re-offending, not solely based on profiling or assessing personality traits or past criminal behaviour.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_OffendingReoffendingRisk a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Offending or Re-offending Risk Assessment High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 6(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Assessing an individual's risk of offending or re-offending, not solely based on profiling or assessing personality traits or past criminal behaviour."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Class ;
owl:complementOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingRiskOfOffending> <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingRiskOfReoffending> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_ProfilingInCrime a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Profiling During Criminal Detection, Investigation, or Prosecution High-Risk Use Case"@en ;

airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_PublicBenefitsEligibility   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_PublicBenefitsEligibility

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_PublicBenefitsEligibility is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems used by public authorities for assessing eligibility to benefits and services, including their allocation, reduction, revocation, or recovery.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_PublicBenefitsEligibility a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Benefits Eligibility Assessment High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 5(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems used by public authorities for assessing eligibility to benefits and services, including their allocation, reduction, revocation, or recovery."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PublicService> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingEligibilityForPublicAssistanceServices> <https://w3id.org/vair#GrantingPublicAssistanceServices> <https://w3id.org/vair#ReclaimingPublicAssistanceServices> <https://w3id.org/vair#ReducingPublicAssistanceServices> <https://w3id.org/vair#RevokingPublicAssistanceServices> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PublicAuthority> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#PotentialPublicServicesApplicant> <https://w3id.org/vair#PublicServicesApplicant> <https://w3id.org/vair#PublicServicesRecipient> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_RecruitmentSelection   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_RecruitmentSelection

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_RecruitmentSelection is a leaf node.

Description

AI systems used for recruitment or selection, particularly targeted job ads, analysing and filtering applications, and evaluating candidates.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_RecruitmentSelection a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Recruitment and Selection High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 4(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI systems used for recruitment or selection, particularly targeted job ads, analysing and filtering applications, and evaluating candidates."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Employment> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingJobCandidates> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluatingJobInterview> <https://w3id.org/vair#JobApplicationAnalysis> <https://w3id.org/vair#JobApplicationFiltering> <https://w3id.org/vair#JobApplicationScreening> <https://w3id.org/vair#PlacingTargetedJobAdvert> <https://w3id.org/vair#Recruiting> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#JobApplicant> <https://w3id.org/vair#JobCandidate> <https://w3id.org/vair#PotentialJobApplicant> ) ] ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_RemoteBiometricIdentification   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_RemoteBiometricIdentification

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_RemoteBiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Remote biometric identification systems, excluding biometric verification that confirms a person is who they claim to be.

Inherits from (3):
airco:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII | airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_RemoteBiometricIdentification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Remote Biometric Identification High-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Annex III, 1(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Remote biometric identification systems, excluding biometric verification that confirms a person is who they claim to be."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#RemoteIdentification> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_BiometricVerification ],
:HighRiskUseCaseAnnexIII .

Class: airco:HighRiskUseCase_SafetyComponentAnnexI   back to top

  • airco:HighRiskUseCase
    • airco:HighRiskUseCase_SafetyComponentAnnexI

NOTE airco:HighRiskUseCase_SafetyComponentAnnexI is a leaf node.

Description

AI system used as a safety component or a product covered by EU laws in Annex I and required to undergo a third-party conformity assessment under those Annex I laws.

Inherits from (2):
airco:HighRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HighRiskUseCase_SafetyComponentAnnexI a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Safety Component Under Annex I Legislation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 6(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system used as a safety component or a product covered by EU laws in Annex I and required to undergo a third-party conformity assessment under those Annex I laws."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_SafetyComponentOrProduct ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_ThirdPartyConformityAssessment ],
:HighRiskUseCase .

Class: airco:HumanResultImprovement   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability
    • airco:HumanResultImprovement

NOTE airco:HumanResultImprovement is a leaf node.

Description

The capability of an AI system to improve the result of a previously completed human activity without replacing the human decision.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:HumanResultImprovement a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Human Result Improvement Capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of an AI system to improve the result of a previously completed human activity without replacing the human decision."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .
