Description

Inherits from (1):
airco:SeriousCrime

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:IllegalWeaponsTrafficking a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Illegal Weapons Trafficking"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SeriousCrime .

Class: airco:IndependentAdministrativeAuthority   back to top

  • airco:AuthorisationBody
    • airco:IndependentAdministrativeAuthority

NOTE airco:IndependentAdministrativeAuthority is a leaf node.

Description

An independent administrative authority that can authorise real-time RemoteBiometricIdentification.

Inherits from (2):
airco:AuthorisationBody | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:IndependentAdministrativeAuthority a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Independent Administrative Authority"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An independent administrative authority that can authorise real-time RemoteBiometricIdentification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :AuthorisationBody .

Class: airco:InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider
    • airco:InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider

NOTE airco:InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider is a leaf node.

Description

A provider of an AI system that directly interacts with people, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Interacting with People AI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A provider of an AI system that directly interacts with people, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification ],
:TransparencyRiskAIProvider .

Class: airco:LawfullyAcquiredBiometricDataset   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/dpv#SensitiveData
    • airco:LawfullyAcquiredBiometricDataset

NOTE airco:LawfullyAcquiredBiometricDataset is a leaf node.

Description

A biometric dataset that has been lawfully acquired.

https://w3id.org/dpv#SensitiveData | https://w3id.org/dpv#Data

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:LawfullyAcquiredBiometricDataset a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Lawfully Acquired Biometric Dataset"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A biometric dataset that has been lawfully acquired."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/dpv#SensitiveData> .

Class: airco:ManipulativePurpose   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose
    • airco:ManipulativePurpose

NOTE airco:ManipulativePurpose is a leaf node.

Description

Purpose of manipulating human behaviour through AI techniques.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ManipulativePurpose a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Manipulative Purpose"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Purpose of manipulating human behaviour through AI techniques."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToTechnique ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ManipulativeTechnique ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose> .

    • airco:MarkingRequirement
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking

Description

A requirement to mark AI-generated content in machine-readable format.

airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:MarkingRequirement a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Marking Requirement"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A requirement to mark AI-generated content in machine-readable format."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyRiskCategory ],
:TransparencyObligation .

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> .

NOTE airco:NarrowProceduralTask is a leaf node.

Description

The capability of an AI system to perform only a narrow, procedural task with limited scope.

https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:NarrowProceduralTask a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Narrow Procedural Task Capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of an AI system to perform only a narrow, procedural task with limited scope."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .

Class: airco:NationalCompetentAuthority   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder
    • airco:NationalCompetentAuthority

NOTE airco:NationalCompetentAuthority is a leaf node.

Description

A national competent authority to which serious incidents must be reported.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:NationalCompetentAuthority a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "National Competent Authority"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A national competent authority to which serious incidents must be reported."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> .

Class: airco:NotificationRequirement   back to top

airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:NotificationRequirement a owl:Class ;

rdfs:comment "A requirement to notify individuals they are interacting with AI."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyRiskCategory ],
:TransparencyObligation .

Class: airco:Obligation   back to top

  • owl:Thing
    • airco:Obligation
      • airco:GPAIObligation
      • airco:HighRiskObligation
      • airco:TransparencyObligation

Description

A specific obligation imposed on a stakeholder by the AI Act.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
airco:governsObligation | airco:isObligationOf

Property Range of:
airco:governsObligation | airco:hasObligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Obligation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Obligation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A specific obligation imposed on a stakeholder by the AI Act."@en .

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .

Class: airco:PoliticalCampaignOrganisation   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose
    • airco:PoliticalCampaignOrganisation

NOTE airco:PoliticalCampaignOrganisation is a leaf node.

Description

Use of AI tools to organise, optimise, and structure political campaigns without directly interacting with people.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PoliticalCampaignOrganisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Political Campaign Organisation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Use of AI tools to organise, optimise, and structure political campaigns without directly interacting with people."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose> .

Class: airco:PoliticalOpinions   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes
    • airco:PoliticalOpinions

NOTE airco:PoliticalOpinions is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes | airco:SensitiveAttribute

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PoliticalOpinions a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Political Opinions"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes .

Class: airco:PreDeploymentCondition   back to top

  • airco:Condition
    • airco:PreDeploymentCondition
      • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_FundamentalRightsImpactAssessment
      • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ObtainAuthorisation
      • airco:Condition_RemoteBiometricIdentification_RegisterInEUDatabase

Description

A condition that must be met before deployment.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Condition

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PreDeploymentCondition a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Pre-Deployment Condition"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A condition that must be met before deployment."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Condition .

Class: airco:PreparatoryTask   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability
    • airco:PreparatoryTask

NOTE airco:PreparatoryTask is a leaf node.

Description

The capability of an AI system to perform a preparatory task to an assessment relevant for high-risk use cases, without making the assessment itself.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PreparatoryTask a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Preparatory Task Capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of an AI system to perform a preparatory task to an assessment relevant for high-risk use cases, without making the assessment itself."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .

Class: airco:ProhibitedCategory   back to top

  • airco:RiskCategory
    • airco:ProhibitedCategory

NOTE airco:ProhibitedCategory is a leaf node.

Description

The Prohibited-Risk category in the AI Act relating to prohibited AI systems.

Inherits from (2):
airco:RiskCategory | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedCategory a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Prohibited Category"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Chapter II, Article 5"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The Prohibited-Risk category in the AI Act relating to prohibited AI systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggeredByRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ProhibitedUseCase ],
:RiskCategory .

Class: airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes   back to top

  • airco:SensitiveAttribute
    • airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes
      • airco:PhilosophicalBeliefs
      • airco:PoliticalOpinions
      • airco:Race
      • airco:ReligiousBeliefs
      • airco:SexLife
      • airco:SexualOrientation
      • airco:TradeUnionMembership

Description

A sensitive personal attribute whose inference from biometric data is prohibited under the EU AI Act.

Inherits from (1):
airco:SensitiveAttribute

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Prohibited Sensitive Attribute"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A sensitive personal attribute whose inference from biometric data is prohibited under the EU AI Act."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :SensitiveAttribute .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase   back to top

  • airco:UseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_CriminalRiskProfiling
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_EmotionInferenceWorkplaceEducation
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_ExploitingVulnerabilities
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_FacialRecognitionDatabaseScraping
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive

Description

Prohibited AI practice.

Inherits from (1):
airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibited AI practice."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ProhibitedCategory ],
:UseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on biometric categorisation systems inferring the race, political opinions, trade union membership, religious or philosophical beliefs, sex life, or sexual orientation of a natural person.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation Inferring Prohibited Sensitive Attributes Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(g)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on biometric categorisation systems inferring the race, political opinions, trade union membership, religious or philosophical beliefs, sex life, or sexual orientation of a natural person."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricCategorisation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom :BiometricData ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_LabellingFilteringLawfulDatasets :Exception_LawEnforcementBiometricCategorisation ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :infersSensitiveAttribute ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :PhilosophicalBeliefs :PoliticalOpinions :Race :ReligiousBeliefs :SexLife :SexualOrientation :TradeUnionMembership ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_CriminalRiskProfiling   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_CriminalRiskProfiling

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_CriminalRiskProfiling is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on assessing the risk of an individual committing criminal offenses solely based on profiling or personality traits.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_CriminalRiskProfiling a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Criminal Risk Assessment Solely Based on Profiling Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(d)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on assessing the risk of an individual committing criminal offenses solely based on profiling or personality traits."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PersonalTraitData ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PredictingRiskOfOffending> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_SolelyBasedOnProfiling ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_AugmentingHumanAssessment ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_EmotionInferenceWorkplaceEducation   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_EmotionInferenceWorkplaceEducation

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_EmotionInferenceWorkplaceEducation is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on inferring emotions in workplaces or educational institutions, except for medical or safety reasons.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_EmotionInferenceWorkplaceEducation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Inferring Emotions in Workplaces and Educational Institutions Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(f)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on inferring emotions in workplaces or educational institutions, except for medical or safety reasons."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EmotionRecognition> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :EmotionInferenceInEducation :EmotionInferenceInWorkplace ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_MedicalReasons :Exception_SafetyReasons ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_ExploitingVulnerabilities   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_ExploitingVulnerabilities

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_ExploitingVulnerabilities is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on AI systems exploiting vulnerabilities related to age, disability, or socio-economic circumstances to distort behaviour, causing significant harm.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_ExploitingVulnerabilities a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Exploiting Vulnerabilities Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(b)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on AI systems exploiting vulnerabilities related to age, disability, or socio-economic circumstances to distort behaviour, causing significant harm."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#VulnerableGroup> <https://w3id.org/vair#VulnerablePerson> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesConsequence ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#ExploitationOfVulnerability> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesConsequence ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#MaterialDistortionOfBehaviour> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesImpact ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Harm> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :exploitsVulnerabilityType ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :AgeVulnerability :DisabilityVulnerability :SocioEconomicVulnerability ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_FacialRecognitionDatabaseScraping   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_FacialRecognitionDatabaseScraping

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_FacialRecognitionDatabaseScraping is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on compiling facial recognition databases by untargeted scraping of facial images from the internet or CCTV footage.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_FacialRecognitionDatabaseScraping a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Compiling Facial Recognition Databases by Untargeted Scraping Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(e)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on compiling facial recognition databases by untargeted scraping of facial images from the internet or CCTV footage."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition> <https://w3id.org/vair#WebScraping> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom :FacialImageData ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#CreatingFacialRecognitionDatabase> <https://w3id.org/vair#ExpandingFacialRecognitionDatabase> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasDataSource ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :CCTVFootage :ScrapedFacialImages ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on real-time remote biometric identification in publicly accessible spaces for law enforcement.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Real-Time Remote Biometric Identification in Public Spaces Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(h)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on real-time remote biometric identification in publicly accessible spaces for law enforcement."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcement> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToLocality ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_ImminentThreat :Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_MissingPersons :Exception_RemoteBiometricIdentification_SeriousCrimeSuspects ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on evaluating or classifying individuals or groups based on social behaviour or personal traits, causing detrimental or unfavourable treatment.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Social Scoring Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(c)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on evaluating or classifying individuals or groups based on social behaviour or personal traits, causing detrimental or unfavourable treatment."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#SocialScoring> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToInput ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :PersonalTraitData :SocialBehaviourData ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#ClassificationOfPeople> <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluationOfPeople> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#Group> <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesImpact ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#DetrimentalTreatment> <https://w3id.org/vair#UnfavourableTreatment> ) ] ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
    • airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive

NOTE airco:ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive is a leaf node.

Description

Prohibition on AI systems deploying subliminal, manipulative, or deceptive techniques to distort behaviour and impair informed decision-making, causing significant harm.

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Subliminal, Manipulative, or Deceptive AI Prohibited Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 5(1)(a)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Prohibition on AI systems deploying subliminal, manipulative, or deceptive techniques to distort behaviour and impair informed decision-making, causing significant harm."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ManipulativePurpose ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToTechnique ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :ManipulativeTechnique <https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique> <https://w3id.org/vair#SubliminalTechnique> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesConsequence ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/vair#ImpairedDecisionMaking> <https://w3id.org/vair#MaterialDistortionOfBehaviour> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :causesImpact ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Harm> ],
:ProhibitedUseCase .

Class: airco:PublicInterestTextGeneration   back to top

  • airco:GeneratingTextContent
    • airco:PublicInterestTextGeneration

NOTE airco:PublicInterestTextGeneration is a leaf node.

Description

Generation of AI text published to inform the public on matters of public interest.

Inherits from (3):
airco:GeneratingTextContent | https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PublicInterestTextGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Interest Text Generation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Generation of AI text published to inform the public on matters of public interest."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToContentType ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SyntheticTextContent ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ],
:GeneratingTextContent .

Class: airco:PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer
    • airco:PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer

NOTE airco:PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer is a leaf node.

Description

A deployer of an AI system generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Interest Text Generation AI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A deployer of an AI system generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure ],
:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer .

Class: airco:QualityManagementSystem   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl
    • airco:QualityManagementSystem

NOTE airco:QualityManagementSystem is a leaf node.

Description

A quality management system to ensure compliance.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:QualityManagementSystem a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Quality Management System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A quality management system to ensure compliance."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> .

Class: airco:RiskCategory   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept
    • airco:RiskCategory
      • airco:GPAIRiskCategory
      • airco:HighRiskCategory
      • airco:ProhibitedCategory
      • airco:TransparencyRiskCategory

Description

A risk classification level under the EU AI Act.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Property Domain of:
airco:triggeredByRegulation

Property Range of:
airco:hasRiskCategory

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:RiskCategory a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Risk Category"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A risk classification level under the EU AI Act."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSystem ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel> <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ) ] ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> .

Class: airco:RiskManagementSystem   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl
    • airco:RiskManagementSystem

NOTE airco:RiskManagementSystem is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:RiskManagementSystem a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Risk Management System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A risk management system established throughout the high-risk AI system's lifecycle."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> .

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder
    • airco:ScientificPanelOfExperts

NOTE airco:ScientificPanelOfExperts is a leaf node.

Description

The scientific panel of independent experts that can issue qualified alerts.

https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .

rdfs:comment "The scientific panel of independent experts that can issue qualified alerts."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> .

https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

rdfs:label "Socio-Economic Vulnerability"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Vulnerability> .

Class: airco:StandardGPAIModel   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel
    • airco:StandardGPAIModel

NOTE airco:StandardGPAIModel is a leaf node.

Description

A GPAI model whose providers are subject to standard GPAI obligations.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:StandardGPAIModel a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Standard GPAI Model"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 53(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A GPAI model whose providers are subject to standard GPAI obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Class ;
owl:complementOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasLicense> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :FreeOpenLicence ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIRiskCategory ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIProvider ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> .

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject
    • airco:Suspect

NOTE airco:Suspect is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Suspect a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Suspect"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A person suspected of having committed, or of being involved in, a criminal offence."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject> .

Class: airco:SyntheticAudioContent   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#Content
    • airco:SyntheticAudioContent

NOTE airco:SyntheticAudioContent is a leaf node.

Description

Synthetically generated or manipulated audio content.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#Content | https://w3id.org/airo#Output

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:SyntheticAudioContent a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Synthetic Audio Content"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Synthetically generated or manipulated audio content."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneratingAudioContent> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#Content> .

Class: airco:SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider
    • airco:SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider

NOTE airco:SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider is a leaf node.

Description

A provider of AI system generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content, subject to transparency obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Synthetic Content Generation AI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A provider of AI system generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content, subject to transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking ],
:TransparencyRiskAIProvider .

  • https://w3id.org/vair#Content
    • airco:SyntheticImageContent

NOTE airco:SyntheticImageContent is a leaf node.

rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;

owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneratingImageContent> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#Content> .

Description

https://w3id.org/vair#Content | https://w3id.org/airo#Output

:SyntheticTextContent a owl:Class ;

rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;

NOTE airco:SyntheticVideoContent is a leaf node.

Description

Synthetically generated or manipulated video content.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#Content | https://w3id.org/airo#Output

rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;

<https://w3id.org/vair#Content> .

Class: airco:System_AssessingEducationLevel   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_AssessingEducationLevel

NOTE airco:System_AssessingEducationLevel is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype that triggers HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_AssessingEducationLevel a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Education Level Assessment System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskUseCase_AssessingEducationLevel ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#AssessingLevelOfEducation> ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#isAppliedWithinDomain> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Education> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_BiometricCategorisation   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_BiometricCategorisation

NOTE airco:System_BiometricCategorisation is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype that triggers TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_BiometricCategorisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricCategorisation> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_BiometricCategorisationSensitive   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_BiometricCategorisationSensitive

NOTE airco:System_BiometricCategorisationSensitive is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype that triggers HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive and ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_BiometricCategorisationSensitive a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Sensitive Biometric Categorisation System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive and ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisationSensitive ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ProhibitedUseCase_BiometricCategorisationProhibitedSensitive ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability> ;

owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference> ] ) ] .

owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#HealthInsuranceRiskAssessment> ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#LifeInsuranceRiskAssessment> ] ) ] ) ] .

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_SocialScoring a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Social Scoring System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ProhibitedUseCase_SocialScoring ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#SocialScoring> ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasInput> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SocialBehaviourData ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EvaluationOfPeople> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_StandardGPAI   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_StandardGPAI

NOTE airco:System_StandardGPAI is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype for systems based on a GPAI without a free and open licence.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_StandardGPAI a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Standard GPAI System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype for systems based on a GPAI without a free and open licence."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :StandardGPAIModel ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasModel> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive

NOTE airco:System_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype that triggers ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Subliminal/Manipulative/Deceptive AI System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ProhibitedUseCase_SubliminalManipulativeDeceptive ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :ManipulativePurpose ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#usesTechnique> ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :ManipulativeTechnique <https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique> <https://w3id.org/vair#SubliminalTechnique> ) ] ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_SyntheticContentGeneration   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_SyntheticContentGeneration

NOTE airco:System_SyntheticContentGeneration is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype that triggers TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_SyntheticContentGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Synthetic Content Generation System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype that triggers TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasPurpose> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#ContentGeneration> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:System_SystemicRiskGPAI   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem
    • airco:System_SystemicRiskGPAI

NOTE airco:System_SystemicRiskGPAI is a leaf node.

Description

AI system archetype for systems based on a GPAI model that present systemic risks.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:System_SystemicRiskGPAI a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Systemic Risk GPAI System"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI system archetype for systems based on a GPAI model that present systemic risks."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggersRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIModel ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
owl:equivalentClass [ a owl:Class ;
owl:intersectionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasTrainingCharacteristic ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighComputeTraining ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasModel> ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> ] ) ] .

Class: airco:SystemicRiskGPAIModel   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel
    • airco:SystemicRiskGPAIModel

NOTE airco:SystemicRiskGPAIModel is a leaf node.

Description

A GPAI model that presents systemic risks. GPAI models present systemic risks when they have high impact capabilities based on technical tools and methodologies, when the cumulative amount of compute used for training is greater than 10^25 FLOPs, or when the Commission determines high impact capabilities.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:SystemicRiskGPAIModel a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Systemic-Risk GPAI Model"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A GPAI model that presents systemic risks. GPAI models present systemic risks when they have high impact capabilities based on technical tools and methodologies, when the cumulative amount of compute used for training is greater than 10^25 FLOPs, or when the Commission determines high impact capabilities."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_HighImpactCapabilitiesOverride ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskSource ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighImpactCapability ] [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasTrainingCharacteristic ;
owl:someValuesFrom :HighComputeTraining ] ) ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasRiskCategory ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIRiskCategory ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder> ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIProvider ],
<https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> .

Class: airco:SystemicRiskGPAIProvider   back to top

  • airco:GPAIProvider
    • airco:SystemicRiskGPAIProvider

NOTE airco:SystemicRiskGPAIProvider is a leaf node.

Description

A provider of a GPAI model that presents systemic risks. Subject to additional obligations beyond standard GPAI obligations.

Inherits from (4):
airco:GPAIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:SystemicRiskGPAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Systemic-Risk GPAI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 51"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A provider of a GPAI model that presents systemic risks. Subject to additional obligations beyond standard GPAI obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_CopyrightPolicy ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_DownstreamProviderInfo ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom :GPAIObligation_TrainingSummary ],
:GPAIProvider .

Class: airco:SystemicRiskObligation   back to top

  • airco:GPAIObligation
    • airco:SystemicRiskObligation
      • airco:GPAIObligation_Cybersecurity
      • airco:GPAIObligation_ModelEvaluation
      • airco:GPAIObligation_SeriousIncidentReporting
      • airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskMitigation
      • airco:GPAIObligation_SystemicRiskNotification

Description

Additional obligations for GPAI models with systemic risk, beyond the standard GPAI obligations.

Inherits from (2):
airco:GPAIObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:SystemicRiskObligation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Systemic-Risk Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 55"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Additional obligations for GPAI models with systemic risk, beyond the standard GPAI obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :isObligationOf ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SystemicRiskGPAIModel ],
:GPAIObligation .

Class: airco:TradeUnionMembership   back to top

  • airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes
    • airco:TradeUnionMembership

NOTE airco:TradeUnionMembership is a leaf node.

Description

Inherits from (2):
airco:ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes | airco:SensitiveAttribute

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TradeUnionMembership a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Trade Union Membership"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :ProhibitedSensitiveAttributes .

Class: airco:TraffickingVictim   back to top

  • airco:Victim
    • airco:TraffickingVictim

NOTE airco:TraffickingVictim is a leaf node.

Description

A person who has been human trafficked or sexually exploited, and is the subject of a search using real-time remote biometric identification.

Inherits from (3):
airco:Victim | https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TraffickingVictim a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Trafficking Victim"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A person who has been human trafficked or sexually exploited, and is the subject of a search using real-time remote biometric identification."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf :Victim .

Class: airco:TrainingSummary   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation
    • airco:TrainingSummary

NOTE airco:TrainingSummary is a leaf node.

Description

A sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training a GPAI model.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TrainingSummary a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Training Summary"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A sufficiently detailed summary about the content used for training a GPAI model."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation> .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation   back to top

  • airco:Obligation
    • airco:TransparencyObligation
      • airco:DisclosureRequirement
      • airco:MarkingRequirement
      • airco:NotificationRequirement
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_CodesOfPractice
      • airco:TransparencyObligation_TimelinessAccessibility

Description

A transparency obligation under Article 50 of the EU AI Act.

Inherits from (1):
airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Transparency Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A transparency obligation under Article 50 of the EU AI Act."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :requiresRiskControl ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#TransparencyMeasure> ],
:Obligation .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure   back to top

  • airco:DisclosureRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure is a leaf node.

Description

Deployers of biometric categorisation systems must inform affected individuals and comply with applicable EU data protection laws.

Inherits from (3):
airco:DisclosureRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_BiometricCategorisationDisclosure a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation Disclosure Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Deployers of biometric categorisation systems must inform affected individuals and comply with applicable EU data protection laws."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :Directive2016_680 ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :GDPR ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :Regulation2018_1725 ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
:DisclosureRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_CodesOfPractice   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyObligation
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_CodesOfPractice

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_CodesOfPractice is a leaf node.

Description

The AI Office shall encourage and facilitate drawing up of codes of practice at Union level to facilitate detection and labelling of artificially generated or manipulated content.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_CodesOfPractice a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Codes of Practice for Content Labelling Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(7)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The AI Office shall encourage and facilitate drawing up of codes of practice at Union level to facilitate detection and labelling of artificially generated or manipulated content."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :AIOffice ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :governsObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure :TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking ) ] ],
:TransparencyObligation .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure   back to top

  • airco:DisclosureRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure is a leaf node.

Description

Deployers of AI systems generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes must disclose that content has been artificially generated or manipulated.

Inherits from (3):
airco:DisclosureRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Deep Fake Disclosure Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Deployers of AI systems generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes must disclose that content has been artificially generated or manipulated."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :DeepFakeAIDeployer ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_ArtisticFictionalWork :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement ) ] ],
:DisclosureRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure   back to top

  • airco:DisclosureRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure is a leaf node.

Description

Deployers of emotion recognition systems must inform affected individuals and comply with applicable EU data protection laws.

Inherits from (3):
airco:DisclosureRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Recognition Disclosure Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Deployers of emotion recognition systems must inform affected individuals and comply with applicable EU data protection laws."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :Directive2016_680 ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :GDPR ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:hasValue :Regulation2018_1725 ;
owl:onProperty <https://w3id.org/airo#compliesWithRegulation> ],
:DisclosureRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification   back to top

  • airco:NotificationRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification is a leaf node.

Description

Providers must ensure that individuals are informed when they are interacting with an AI system, unless this is obvious in the given context.

Inherits from (3):
airco:NotificationRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Interacting with People Notification Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Providers must ensure that individuals are informed when they are interacting with an AI system, unless this is obvious in the given context."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_NotObviousAI ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement ],
:NotificationRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure   back to top

  • airco:DisclosureRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure is a leaf node.

Description

Deployers of AI systems generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest must disclose that the text has been artificially generated or manipulated.

Inherits from (3):
airco:DisclosureRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Interest AI Text Generation Disclosure Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Deployers of AI systems generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest must disclose that the text has been artificially generated or manipulated."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement :Exception_HumanEditorialReview ) ] ],
:DisclosureRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking   back to top

  • airco:MarkingRequirement
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking is a leaf node.

Description

Providers of AI systems generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content must ensure outputs are marked in machine-readable format and detectable as artificially generated or manipulated.

Inherits from (3):
airco:MarkingRequirement | airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Machine-Readable Synthetic Content Marking Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Providers of AI systems generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content must ensure outputs are marked in machine-readable format and detectable as artificially generated or manipulated."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasCondition ;
owl:someValuesFrom :Condition_TechnicalFeasibility ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasException ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :Exception_AssistiveEditing :Exception_CriminalLawEnforcement :Exception_NoSubstantialAlteration ) ] ],
:MarkingRequirement .

Class: airco:TransparencyObligation_TimelinessAccessibility   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyObligation
    • airco:TransparencyObligation_TimelinessAccessibility

NOTE airco:TransparencyObligation_TimelinessAccessibility is a leaf node.

Description

Information under Article 50(1)-(4) must be provided in a clear and distinguishable manner at the latest at the time of the first interaction or exposure, and must conform to applicable accessibility requirements.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyObligation | airco:Obligation

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyObligation_TimelinessAccessibility a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Timeliness and Accessibility of Transparency Information Obligation"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(5)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Information under Article 50(1)-(4) must be provided in a clear and distinguishable manner at the latest at the time of the first interaction or exposure, and must conform to applicable accessibility requirements."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :governsObligation ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :TransparencyObligation_DeepFakeDisclosure :TransparencyObligation_EmotionRecognitionDisclosure :TransparencyObligation_InteractingWithPeopleNotification :TransparencyObligation_PublicInterestTextGenerationDisclosure :TransparencyObligation_SyntheticContentGenerationMarking ) ] ],
:TransparencyObligation .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer
    • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer
      • airco:BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer
      • airco:DeepFakeAIDeployer
      • airco:EmotionRecognitionAIDeployer
      • airco:PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer

Description

Deployer of an AI System with transparency obligations.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Transparency-Risk AI Deployer"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Deployer of an AI System with transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer> .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider
    • airco:TransparencyRiskAIProvider
      • airco:InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider
      • airco:SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider

Description

Provider of an AI System with transparency obligations.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider | https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskAIProvider a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Transparency-Risk AI Provider"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Provider of an AI System with transparency obligations."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider> .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskCategory   back to top

  • airco:RiskCategory
    • airco:TransparencyRiskCategory

NOTE airco:TransparencyRiskCategory is a leaf node.

Description

The Transparency-Risk category in the AI Act relating to transparency obligations in AI systems.

Inherits from (2):
airco:RiskCategory | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskCategory a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Transparency-Risk Category"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Chapter IV, Article 50"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The Transparency-Risk category in the AI Act relating to transparency obligations in AI systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :triggeredByRegulation ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :DisclosureRequirement :MarkingRequirement :NotificationRequirement ) ] ],
:RiskCategory .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase   back to top

  • airco:UseCase
    • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_DeepFakeGeneration
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_InteractingWithPeople
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_PublicInterestTextGeneration
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration

Description

Transparency-Risk AI practice requiring transparency measures.

Inherits from (1):
airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Transparency-Risk AI practice requiring transparency measures."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :TransparencyRiskAIDeployer :TransparencyRiskAIProvider ) ] ],
:UseCase .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase
    • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation

NOTE airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation is a leaf node.

Description

Biometric-categorisation systems.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_BiometricCategorisation a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Categorisation Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Biometric-categorisation systems."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToCapability ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricCategorisation> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :BiometricCategorisationAIDeployer ],
:TransparencyRiskUseCase .

  • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase

Description

Generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes.

airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_DeepFakeGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Deep Fake Generation Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Generating or manipulating image, audio, or video deep fakes."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom :DeepFakeGeneration ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;

owl:someValuesFrom :DeepFakeAIDeployer ],
:TransparencyRiskUseCase .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_EmotionRecognition a owl:Class ;

dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(3)"@en ;
