NOTE airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_InteractingWithPeople is a leaf node.

Description

AI directly interacting with people.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_InteractingWithPeople a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Interacting with People Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "AI directly interacting with people."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :InteractingWithPeopleAIProvider ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToSubject ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#NaturalPerson> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :hasSubjectInvolvement ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#ActiveInvolvement> ],
:TransparencyRiskUseCase .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_PublicInterestTextGeneration   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase
    • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_PublicInterestTextGeneration

NOTE airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_PublicInterestTextGeneration is a leaf node.

Description

Generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_PublicInterestTextGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Public Interest Text AI Generation Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Generating or manipulating text published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToContentType ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SyntheticTextContent ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PublicInterestTextGeneration ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :PublicInterestTextGenerationAIDeployer ],
:TransparencyRiskUseCase .

Class: airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration   back to top

  • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase
    • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration

NOTE airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration is a leaf node.

Description

Generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content.

Inherits from (2):
airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase | airco:UseCase

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:TransparencyRiskUseCase_SyntheticContentGeneration a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Synthetic Content Generation Transparency-Risk Use Case"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 50(2)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text content."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToPurpose ;
owl:someValuesFrom [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( :GeneratingTextContent <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneratingAudioContent> <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneratingImageContent> <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneratingVideoContent> ) ] ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom :SyntheticContentGenerationAIProvider ],
:TransparencyRiskUseCase .

Class: airco:UrgentPatientTriage   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#EmergencyTriage
    • airco:UrgentPatientTriage

NOTE airco:UrgentPatientTriage is a leaf node.

Description

Urgent patient triage in emergency healthcare, classified as high risk under emergency call evaluation.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#EmergencyTriage | https://w3id.org/airo#Purpose

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:UrgentPatientTriage a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Urgent Patient Triage"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Urgent patient triage in emergency healthcare, classified as high risk under emergency call evaluation."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf [ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToDomain ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#Health> ],
[ a owl:Restriction ;
owl:onProperty :appliesToStakeholder ;
owl:someValuesFrom <https://w3id.org/vair#EmergencyHealthCareProvider> ],
<https://w3id.org/vair#EmergencyTriage> .

Class: airco:UseCase   back to top

  • owl:Thing
    • airco:UseCase
      • airco:HighRiskUseCase
      • airco:ProhibitedUseCase
      • airco:TransparencyRiskUseCase

Description

A specific use case of an AI system under the EU AI Act. Use cases are classified into risk categories based on applicable classification rules.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:UseCase a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Use Case"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A specific use case of an AI system under the EU AI Act. Use cases are classified into risk categories based on applicable classification rules."@en .

Description

https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix : <https://w3id.org/airco#> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

:Victim a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Victim"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A person who has suffered harm from, or is the target of, a criminal offence or other wrongful act."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject> .

https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<http://www.semanticweb.org/owl/owlapi/turtle#API> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "API"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Application Programming Interface."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> ;
skos:definition "Application Programming Interface."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "API"@en .

Description

The capability of an AI system that enables realisation of the system's purposes.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Range of:
airco:appliesToCapability | https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of an AI system that enables realisation of the system's purposes."@en .

      • https://w3id.org/vair#Tool

Description

Functional element that constructs an AI system.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability | https://w3id.org/airo#hasInput | https://w3id.org/airo#hasLifecyclePhase | https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder | https://w3id.org/airo#isAppliedWithinDomain | https://w3id.org/airo#isDeployedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isDevelopedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isProvidedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isUsedWithinLocality | https://w3id.org/airo#producesOutput | https://w3id.org/airo#usesTechnique

Property Range of:
https://w3id.org/airo#hasComponent

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Component"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.2"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Functional element that constructs an AI system."@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator
    • https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer
      • airco:TransparencyRiskAIDeployer

Description

Any natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body using an AI system under its authority except where the AI system is used in the course of a personal non-professional activity.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Property Range of:
https://w3id.org/airo#isDeployedBy

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeployer> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Deployer"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 3(4)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Any natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body using an AI system under its authority except where the AI system is used in the course of a personal non-professional activity."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator> .

https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

https://w3id.org/airo#isDevelopedBy

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AIDeveloper> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Developer"@en ;

rdfs:comment "An organisation or entity that is concerned with the development of AI services and products."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> .

Property Range of:

rdfs:comment "Mathematical construct that generates an inference or prediction, based on input data."@en ;

Description

A natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that develops an AI system or a general-purpose AI model or that has an AI system or a general-purpose AI model developed and places it on the market or puts the AI system into service under its own name or trademark, whether for payment or free of charge.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Property Range of:
https://w3id.org/airo#isProvidedBy

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AIProvider> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI Provider"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 3(3)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that develops an AI system or a general-purpose AI model or that has an AI system or a general-purpose AI model developed and places it on the market or puts the AI system into service under its own name or trademark, whether for payment or free of charge."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator> .

Description

A machine-based system that is designed to operate with varying levels of autonomy and that may exhibit adaptiveness after deployment, and that, for explicit or implicit objectives, infers, from the input it receives, how to generate outputs such as predictions, content, recommendations, or decisions that can influence physical or virtual environments.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
airco:hasTrainingCharacteristic | airco:triggersRegulation | https://w3id.org/airo#hasAISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#hasAIUser | https://w3id.org/airo#hasAutomationLevel | https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability | https://w3id.org/airo#hasInput | https://w3id.org/airo#hasLifecyclePhase | https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder | https://w3id.org/airo#isAppliedWithinDomain | https://w3id.org/airo#isDeployedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isDevelopedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isProvidedBy | https://w3id.org/airo#isUsedWithinLocality | https://w3id.org/airo#producesOutput | https://w3id.org/airo#runsOnHardware | https://w3id.org/airo#usesTechnique

Property Range of:
airco:appliesToSystem

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "AI System"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 3(1)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A machine-based system that is designed to operate with varying levels of autonomy and that may exhibit adaptiveness after deployment, and that, for explicit or implicit objectives, infers, from the input it receives, how to generate outputs such as predictions, content, recommendations, or decisions that can influence physical or virtual environments."@en .

https://w3id.org/airo#hasFrequency

Implementation:

Class: https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel
    • https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel
      • airco:FreeOpenLicenceGPAIModel
      • airco:StandardGPAIModel
      • airco:SystemicRiskGPAIModel

Description

An AI model, including where such an AI model is trained with a large amount of data using self-supervision at scale, that displays significant generality and is capable of competently performing a wide range of distinct tasks regardless of the way the model is placed on the market and that can be integrated into a variety of downstream systems or applications.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel | https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#GPAIModel> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "General Purpose AI Model"@en ;
dcterms:source "EU AI Act, Article 3(63)"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An AI model, including where such an AI model is trained with a large amount of data using self-supervision at scale, that displays significant generality and is capable of competently performing a wide range of distinct tasks regardless of the way the model is placed on the market and that can be integrated into a variety of downstream systems or applications."@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIModel> .

Class: https://w3id.org/airo#Risk   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept
    • https://w3id.org/airo#Risk
      • https://w3id.org/airo#Misuse

Description

the state of uncertainty associated with an AI system, that has the potential to cause harms and is expressed in terms of risk sources, consequences, impacts, likelihood, and severity

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Property Domain of:
https://w3id.org/airo#hasConsequence | https://w3id.org/airo#hasResidualRisk

Property Range of:
https://w3id.org/airo#hasResidualRisk | https://w3id.org/airo#hasRisk | https://w3id.org/airo#isRiskSourceFor

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#Risk> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Risk"@en ;
rdfs:comment "the state of uncertainty associated with an AI system, that has the potential to cause harms and is expressed in terms of risk sources, consequences, impacts, likelihood, and severity"@en ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> .

  • owl:Thing

      • https://w3id.org/airo#Risk

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

rdfs:label "Risk Concept"@en ;
rdfs:comment "An umbrella term for refering to risk, risk source, consequence and impact."@en .

A measure that maintains and/or modifies risk (and risk concepts).

owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
https://w3id.org/airo#detectsRiskConcept | https://w3id.org/airo#eliminatesRiskConcept | https://w3id.org/airo#isFollowedByControl | https://w3id.org/airo#isPartOfControl | https://w3id.org/airo#mitigatesRiskConcept | https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept

Property Range of:
airco:requiresRiskControl | https://w3id.org/airo#hasRiskControl | https://w3id.org/airo#isFollowedByControl | https://w3id.org/airo#isPartOfControl

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Risk Control"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 31073, 3.3.33 (with expansion of scope)" ;
rdfs:comment "A measure that maintains and/or modifies risk (and risk concepts)."@en .

rdfs:comment "An element which alone or in combination has the potential to give rise to risk."@en ;

Description

Represents any individual, group or organization that can affect, be affected by or perceive itself to be affected by a decision or activity.

Inherits from:
owl:Thing

Property Domain of:
https://w3id.org/airo#hasControlOverAIOutput | https://w3id.org/airo#hasHumanInvolvement

Property Range of:
airco:appliesToStakeholder | https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnStakeholder | https://w3id.org/airo#hasStakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Stakeholder"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Represents any individual, group or organization that can affect, be affected by or perceive itself to be affected by a decision or activity."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.5.13"@en .

Description

A technical specification, adopted by a recognised standardisation body, for repeated or continuous application, with which compliance is not compulsory.

owl:Thing

Property Range of:
https://w3id.org/airo#conformsToStandard

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#Standard> a owl:Class ;
rdfs:label "Standard"@en ;
dcterms:source "Regulation (EU) No 1025/2012 on European standardisation" ;
rdfs:comment "A technical specification, adopted by a recognised standardisation body, for repeated or continuous application, with which compliance is not compulsory."@en .

skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.14" ;

skos:prefLabel "Artificial General Intelligence"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneralAI> .

      • https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification

Description

Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Identification"@en ;
dcterms:source "The AI Act, Recital 15" ;
rdfs:comment "Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Biometric Identification"@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Technique
    • https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique is a leaf node.

Description

Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#Technique

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Deceptive Technique"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Recital (29) " ;
rdfs:comment "Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Technique> ;
skos:definition "Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Deceptive Technique"@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#ComputerVision
    • https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition is a leaf node.

Description

Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#ComputerVision | https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Face Recognition"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.7.2" ;
rdfs:comment "Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#ComputerVision> ;
skos:definition "Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Face Recognition"@en .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#Harm   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#Impact
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Harm

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Harm is a leaf node.

Description

Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/airo#Impact | https://w3id.org/airo#Consequence | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Harm> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Harm"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Impact> ;
skos:definition "Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Harm"@en .

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Inaccurate Recommendation"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Inaccurate recommendation generated by the system."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#LowAccuracy> ;
skos:definition "Inaccurate recommendation generated by the system."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Inaccurate Recommendation"@en .

https://w3id.org/airo#Documentation

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator
    • https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority is a leaf node.

Description

Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Law Enforcement Authority"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Art. 3(45)" ;
rdfs:comment """Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security."""@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator> ;
skos:definition """Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security."""@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Law Enforcement Authority"@en .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Model Evasion"@en ;
dcterms:source "ALTAI" ;
rdfs:comment "An input, which seems normal for a human but is wrongly classified by ML models."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Attack> ;
skos:definition "An input, which seems normal for a human but is wrongly classified by ML models."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Model Evasion"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#Model> .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#Attack
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion is a leaf node.

Description

A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data.

Inherits from (3):
https://w3id.org/vair#Attack | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskSource | https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Model Inversion"@en ;
dcterms:source "ALTAI" ;
rdfs:comment "A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Attack> ;
skos:definition "A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Model Inversion"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#Model> .

rdfs:comment "Refers to the operation stage when an AI system is running and generally available for use."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase> ;
skos:definition "Refers to the operation stage when an AI system is running and generally available for use."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Operation"@en .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AutomationLevel> ;

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling is a leaf node.

Description

Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Profiling"@en ;
dcterms:source "GDPR, Art. 4(4)" ;
rdfs:comment "Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Profiling"@en .

https://w3id.org/airo#AISubject | https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#LocalityOfUse
    • https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace is a leaf node.

Description

Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#LocalityOfUse

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Publicly Accessible Space"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Article 3(44)" ;
rdfs:comment "Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#LocalityOfUse> ;
skos:definition ""@en,
"Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Publicly Accessible Space"@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation is a leaf node.

Description

https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase

Implementation:

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase> ;
skos:definition "After the operation and monitoring stage, based on the results of the work of the AI system, the need for a reassessment can arise."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Re-Evaluation"@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification
    • https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification | https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Real Time Remote Biometric Identification"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Article (42)" ;
rdfs:comment "Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> ;
skos:definition "Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Real Time Remote Biometric Identification"@en .

https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

skos:definition "Computationally identifying and categorizing opinions expressed in a piece of text, speech or image, to determine a range of feeling such as from positive to negative."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Sentiment Analysis"@en .

https://w3id.org/vair#Robot | https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .

@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

"ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.29",
"SOURCE: ISO 8373:2021, 3.7" ;

rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Service Robot"@en .

Class: https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning   back to top

  • https://w3id.org/vair#MachineLearning
    • https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning is a leaf node.

Description

Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training.

Inherits from (2):
https://w3id.org/vair#MachineLearning | https://w3id.org/airo#AITechnique

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Unsupervised Learning"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.3.17" ;
rdfs:comment "Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#MachineLearning> ;
skos:definition "Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Unsupervised Learning"@en .

https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

rdfs:label "detects risk concept"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates the control used for detecting risks, risk sources, consequences, and impacts."@en ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> ;
rdfs:subPropertyOf <https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept> .

rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> ;
rdfs:subPropertyOf <https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept> .

Specifies capabilities implemented within an AI system to materialise its purposes.

Class Domain for:
https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent | https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

Class Range for:
https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#hasCapability> a owl:ObjectProperty ;
rdfs:label "has capability"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Specifies capabilities implemented within an AI system to materialise its purposes."@en ;
rdfs:domain [ a owl:Class ;
owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ) ] ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#hasChangedEntity   back to top

NOTE https://w3id.org/airo#hasChangedEntity is a leaf node.

Description

https://w3id.org/airo#Change

rdfs:label "has changed entity"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates the entity that is being changed."@en ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#Change> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#hasComponent   back to top

https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

rdfs:label "has component"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates a component incorporating an AI system or another component."@en ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> .

https://w3id.org/airo#Risk

rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#Risk> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#Consequence> .

Specifies the area (e.g. physical health) that is impacted by an AI system or component.

https://w3id.org/airo#Impact

https://w3id.org/airo#AreaOfImpact

rdfs:comment "Specifies the area (e.g. physical health) that is impacted by an AI system or component." ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#Impact> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#AreaOfImpact> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnEntity   back to top

Description

Indicates entities, e.g. environment, impacted by AI systems.

Has sub-property (direct):
https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnStakeholder

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnStakeholder   back to top

NOTE https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnStakeholder is a leaf node.

Description

Indicates the people that are (negatively) impacted by an AI system or component.

https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnEntity

https://w3id.org/airo#Impact

Class Range for:
https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

rdfs:label "has impact on stakeholder"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates the people that are (negatively) impacted by an AI system or component."@en ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#Impact> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#Stakeholder> ;
rdfs:subPropertyOf <https://w3id.org/airo#hasImpactOnEntity> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#hasInput   back to top

owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ) ] ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#Input> .

NOTE https://w3id.org/airo#isAppliedWithinDomain is a leaf node.

https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent | https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

owl:unionOf ( <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ) ] ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#Domain> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#mitigatesRiskConcept   back to top

NOTE https://w3id.org/airo#mitigatesRiskConcept is a leaf node.

Description

Indicates the control used for mitigating risks, risk sources, consequences, and impacts.

Inherits from (1):
https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept

Class Domain for:
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Class Range for:
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#mitigatesRiskConcept> a owl:ObjectProperty ;
rdfs:label "mitigates risk concept"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates the control used for mitigating risks, risk sources, consequences, and impacts."@en ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> ;
rdfs:subPropertyOf <https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept> .

Object Property: https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept   back to top

Description

Indicates the control employed to modify risks, risk sources, consequences, and impacts.

Has sub-property (direct):
https://w3id.org/airo#detectsRiskConcept | https://w3id.org/airo#eliminatesRiskConcept | https://w3id.org/airo#mitigatesRiskConcept

Class Domain for:
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl

Class Range for:
https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept

Implementation:

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

<https://w3id.org/airo#modifiesRiskConcept> a owl:ObjectProperty ;
rdfs:label "modifies risk concept"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Indicates the control employed to modify risks, risk sources, consequences, and impacts."@en ;
rdfs:domain <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskControl> ;
rdfs:range <https://w3id.org/airo#RiskConcept> .

Description

Application Programming Interface.

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "API"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Application Programming Interface."@en ;

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIComponent> ;
skos:definition "Application Programming Interface."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "API"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#AGI   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#AGI

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#AGI is a leaf node.

Description

Type of AI system that addresses a broad range of tasks with a satisfactory level of performance.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#AGI> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Artificial General Intelligence"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.14" ;
rdfs:comment "Type of AI system that addresses a broad range of tasks with a satisfactory level of performance."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
skos:definition "Type of AI system that addresses a broad range of tasks with a satisfactory level of performance."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Artificial General Intelligence"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#GeneralAI> .

skos:definition "A form of AI documentation"@en ;

skos:prefLabel "AI Cards"@en .

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Approval is a leaf node.

<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

skos:definition "A person who has applied for asylum"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Asylum Seeker"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#Autonomy   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Autonomy

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Autonomy is a leaf node.

Description

The level of automation where the system is capable of modifying its intended domain of use or its goals without external intervention, control or oversight.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Autonomy"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 5.13" ;
rdfs:comment "The level of automation where the system is capable of modifying its intended domain of use or its goals without external intervention, control or oversight."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AutomationLevel> ;
skos:definition "The level of automation where the system is capable of modifying its intended domain of use or its goals without external intervention, control or oversight."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Autonomy"@en .

skos:definition "Probabilistic model that uses Bayesian inference for probability computations using a directed acyclic graph."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;

skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

rdfs:comment "The capability of the system is assigning natural persons to specific categories based on their biometric data" ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "The capability of the system is assigning natural persons to specific categories based on their biometric data"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Biometric Categorisation"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Biometric Identification"@en ;
dcterms:source "The AI Act, Recital 15" ;
rdfs:comment "Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Automated recognition of physical, physiological and behavioural human features such as the face, eye movement, body shape, voice, prosody, gait, posture, heart rate, blood pressure, odour, keystrokes characteristics, for the purpose of establishing an individual’s identity by comparing biometric data of that individual to stored biometric data of individuals in a reference database, irrespective of whether the individual has given its consent or not"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Biometric Identification"@en .

Description

Implementation:

@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Cannot Opt Out Of Output"@en ;
rdfs:comment "A mode of controllability that stakeholders cannot opt out of the system’s output."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#ModeOfOutputControllability> ;
skos:definition "A mode of controllability that stakeholders cannot opt out of the system’s output."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Cannot Opt Out Of Output"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ConditionalAutomation   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ConditionalAutomation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ConditionalAutomation is a leaf node.

Description

The level of automation where there is sustained and specific performance by a system, with an external agent being ready to take over when necessary.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ConditionalAutomation> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Conditional Automation"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 5.13" ;
rdfs:comment "The level of automation where there is sustained and specific performance by a system, with an external agent being ready to take over when necessary."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AutomationLevel> ;
skos:definition "The level of automation where there is sustained and specific performance by a system, with an external agent being ready to take over when necessary."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Conditional Automation"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ContinuousValidation   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ContinuousValidation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ContinuousValidation is a leaf node.

Description

Refers to validation phase of continuous learning AI systems, wherein incremental training takes place on an ongoing basis while the system is running in production.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ContinuousValidation> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Continuous Validation"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 6.2.7" ;
rdfs:comment "Refers to validation phase of continuous learning AI systems, wherein incremental training takes place on an ongoing basis while the system is running in production."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase> ;
skos:definition "Refers to validation phase of continuous learning AI systems, wherein incremental training takes place on an ongoing basis while the system is running in production."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Continuous Validation"@en .

skos:definition "Attack trying to manipulate the training dataset."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Data Poisoning"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#TrainingData> .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique is a leaf node.

Description

Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#DeceptiveTechnique> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Deceptive Technique"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Recital (29) " ;
rdfs:comment "Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Technique> ;
skos:definition "Techniques that subvert or impair a person’s autonomy, decision-making or free choice in ways that the person is not consciously aware or, where it is aware, can still be deceived or is not able to control or resist them."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Deceptive Technique"@en .

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#DialogueManagement is a leaf node.

Description

Choosing the appropriate next move in a dialogue based on user input, the dialogue history and other contextual knowledge to meet a desired goal

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#DialogueManagement> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Dialogue Management"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.6.2" ;
rdfs:comment "Choosing the appropriate next move in a dialogue based on user input, the dialogue history and other contextual knowledge to meet a desired goal"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Choosing the appropriate next move in a dialogue based on user input, the dialogue history and other contextual knowledge to meet a desired goal."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Dialogue Management"@en .

Computationally identifying and categorizing emotions expressed in a piece of text, speech, video or image or combination thereof.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Emotion Recognition"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.6.3"@en ;

rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Computationally identifying and categorizing emotions expressed in a piece of text, speech, video or image or combination thereof."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Emotion Recognition"@en .

    • https://w3id.org/vair#ExpertSystem

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ExpertSystem is a leaf node.

Description

AI system that accumulates, combines and encapsulates knowledge provided by a human expert or experts in a specific domain to infer solutions to problems.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ExpertSystem> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Expert System"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.13" ;
rdfs:comment "AI system that accumulates, combines and encapsulates knowledge provided by a human expert or experts in a specific domain to infer solutions to problems."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AISystem> ;
skos:definition "AI system that accumulates, combines and encapsulates knowledge provided by a human expert or experts in a specific domain to infer solutions to problems."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Expert System"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#ReasoningTechnique> .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition is a leaf node.

Description

Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#FaceRecognition> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Face Recognition"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.7.2" ;
rdfs:comment "Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#ComputerVision> ;
skos:definition "Automatic pattern recognition comparing stored images of human faces with the image of an actual face, indicating any matching, if it exists, and any data, if they exist, identifying the person to whom the face belongs."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Face Recognition"@en .

Description

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Feed Forward Neural Network"@en ;

rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#NeuralNetwork> ;
skos:definition "Neural network where information is fed from the input layer to the output layer in one direction only."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Feed Forward Neural Network"@en .

    • https://w3id.org/vair#GeneticAlgorithm

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#GeneticAlgorithm is a leaf node.

Description

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Genetic Algorithm"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.15"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Algorithm which simulates natural selection by creating and evolving a population of individuals (solutions) for optimization problems"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Algorithm> ;
skos:definition "Algorithm which simulates natural selection by creating and evolving a population of individuals (solutions) for optimization problems. [ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.15]"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Genetic Algorithm"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#Harm   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Harm

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Harm is a leaf node.

Description

Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases.

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Harm> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Harm"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Impact> ;
skos:definition "Harmful impacts associated with an AI system. The types of harms include physical, psychological, financial, and economic harms that may be compound with broader societal harms in certain cases."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Harm"@en .

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#InformationProvision

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#InformationProvision is a leaf node.

Description

Providing information to inform the user of in particular an AI system’s intended purpose and proper use, inclusive of the specific geographical, behavioural or functional setting within which the AI system is intended to be used.

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Information Provision"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Providing information to inform the user of in particular an AI system’s intended purpose and proper use, inclusive of the specific geographical, behavioural or functional setting within which the AI system is intended to be used."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#OrganisationalMeasure> ;
skos:definition "Providing information to inform the user of in particular an AI system’s intended purpose and proper use, inclusive of the specific geographical, behavioural or functional setting within which the AI system is intended to be used."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Information Provision"@en .

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Information Retrieval"@en .

""@en ;

skos:prefLabel "Intelligent Control System"@en .

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority is a leaf node.

Description

Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#LawEnforcementAuthority> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Law Enforcement Authority"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Art. 3(45)" ;
rdfs:comment """Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security."""@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator> ;
skos:definition """Law enforcement authority means:
(a) any public authority competent for the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security; or
(b) any other body or entity entrusted by Member State law to exercise public authority and public powers for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties, including the safeguarding against and the prevention of threats to public security."""@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Law Enforcement Authority"@en .

Description

type of recurrent neural network that processes sequential data with a satisfactory performance for both long and short span dependencies.

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Long ShortTerm Memory"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989 3.4.7" ;

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#RecurrentNeuralNetwork> ;

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Long ShortTerm Memory"@en .

skos:definition "physical, mathematical or otherwise logical representation of a system, entity, phenomenon, process or data. "@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Model"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ModelEvasion   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ModelEvasion

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ModelEvasion is a leaf node.

Description

An input, which seems normal for a human but is wrongly classified by ML models.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ModelEvasion> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Model Evasion"@en ;
dcterms:source "ALTAI" ;
rdfs:comment "An input, which seems normal for a human but is wrongly classified by ML models."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Attack> ;
skos:definition "An input, which seems normal for a human but is wrongly classified by ML models."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Model Evasion"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#Model> .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion is a leaf node.

Description

A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ModelInversion> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Model Inversion"@en ;
dcterms:source "ALTAI" ;
rdfs:comment "A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Attack> ;
skos:definition "A type of attack to AI models, in which the access to a model is abused to infer information about the training data."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Model Inversion"@en ;
skos:related <https://w3id.org/vair#Model> .

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Algorithm> ;

skos:prefLabel "Optimisation Method"@en .

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#ModeOfOutputControllability> ;
skos:definition "A mode of controllability that stakeholders can opt in the system’s output."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Optting In Output"@en .

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#PartOfSpeechTagging   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#PartOfSpeechTagging

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#PartOfSpeechTagging is a leaf node.

Description

Assigning a category (e.g. verb, noun, adjective) to a word based on its grammatical properties.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#PartOfSpeechTagging> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Part Of Speech Tagging"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.6.13" ;
rdfs:comment "Assigning a category (e.g. verb, noun, adjective) to a word based on its grammatical properties."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Assigning a category (e.g. verb, noun, adjective) to a word based on its grammatical properties."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Part Of Speech Tagging"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#PartialAutomation   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#PartialAutomation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#PartialAutomation is a leaf node.

Description

The level of automation where some sub-functions of the system are fully automated while the system remains under the control of an external agent

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#PartialAutomation> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Partial Automation"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 5.13" ;
rdfs:comment "The level of automation where some sub-functions of the system are fully automated while the system remains under the control of an external agent"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AutomationLevel> ;
skos:definition "The level of automation where some sub-functions of the system are fully automated while the system remains under the control of an external agent"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Partial Automation"@en .

any information that (a) can be used to establish a link between the information and the natural person to whom such information relates, or (b) is or can be directly or indirectly linked to a natural person [ISO/IEC 22989, 3.2.11]

skos:prefLabel "Personal Data"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling is a leaf node.

Description

Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Profiling> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Profiling"@en ;
dcterms:source "GDPR, Art. 4(4)" ;
rdfs:comment "Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person’s performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Profiling"@en .

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AIOperator> ;
skos:definition "An entity that acts on behalf of public authorities."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Public Authority Agent"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace is a leaf node.

Description

Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#PubliclyAccessibleSpace> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Publicly Accessible Space"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Article 3(44)" ;
rdfs:comment "Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#LocalityOfUse> ;
skos:definition ""@en,
"Any publicly or privately owned physical place accessible to an undetermined number of natural persons, regardless of whether certain conditions for access may apply, and regardless of the potential capacity restrictions"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Publicly Accessible Space"@en .

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#QuestionAnswering

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#QuestionAnswering is a leaf node.

Description

Determining the most appropriate answer to a question provided in natural language.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
