owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Question Answering"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.6.14" ;
rdfs:comment "Determining the most appropriate answer to a question provided in natural language."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Determining the most appropriate answer to a question provided in natural language."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Question Answering"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation is a leaf node.

Description

After the operation and monitoring stage, based on the results of the work of the AI system, the need for a reassessment can arise.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ReEvaluation> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Re-Evaluation"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 6.2.8" ;
rdfs:comment "After the operation and monitoring stage, based on the results of the work of the AI system, the need for a reassessment can arise."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AILifecyclePhase> ;
skos:definition "After the operation and monitoring stage, based on the results of the work of the AI system, the need for a reassessment can arise."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Re-Evaluation"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#RealTimeRemoteBiometricIdentification> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Real Time Remote Biometric Identification"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Article (42)" ;
rdfs:comment "Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#BiometricIdentification> ;
skos:definition "Capability of capturing of biometric data, the comparison and the identification all occur without a significant delay, comprising not only instant identification, but also limited short delays in order to avoid circumvention."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Real Time Remote Biometric Identification"@en .

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Recurrent Neural Network"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#RemoteBiometricIdentification   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#RemoteBiometricIdentification

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#RemoteBiometricIdentification is a leaf node.

Description

Identifying natural persons at a distance through the comparison of a person’s biometric data with the biometric data contained in a reference database.

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#RemoteBiometricIdentification> a owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:definition "Identifying natural persons at a distance through the comparison of a person’s biometric data with the biometric data contained in a reference database."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "RemoteBiometricIdentification"@en .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#IdentiftyingIndividuals> ;
skos:definition "Refers to the identification of natural persons without their active involvement, typically at a distance"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Remote Identification"@en .

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Robot"@en .

Description

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .

owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Safety Component"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Act, Art. 3(14)" ;
rdfs:comment "Component of a product or of an AI system which fulfils a safety function for that product or AI system, or the failure or malfunctioning of which endangers the health and safety of persons or property"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Modality> ;
skos:definition "Component of a product or of an AI system which fulfils a safety function for that product or AI system, or the failure or malfunctioning of which endangers the health and safety of persons or property."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Safety Component"@en .

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#MachineLearning> ;

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference is a leaf node.

Description

The capability of infering sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#SensitiveAttributeInference> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Sensitive Attribute Inference"@en ;
rdfs:comment "The capability of infering sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "The capability of infering sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Sensitive Attribute Inference"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#SentimentAnalysis   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#SentimentAnalysis

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#SentimentAnalysis is a leaf node.

Description

Computationally identifying and categorizing opinions expressed in a piece of text, speech or image, to determine a range of feeling such as from positive to negative.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#SentimentAnalysis> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Sentiment Analysis"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.6.16" ;
rdfs:comment "Computationally identifying and categorizing opinions expressed in a piece of text, speech or image, to determine a range of feeling such as from positive to negative."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;
skos:definition "Computationally identifying and categorizing opinions expressed in a piece of text, speech or image, to determine a range of feeling such as from positive to negative."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Sentiment Analysis"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#Service   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Service

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Service is a leaf node.

Description

Refers to system provided as a service

Implementation:

@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#Service> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Service"@en ;
rdfs:comment "Refers to system provided as a service"@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#Modality> ;
skos:definition "Refers to system provided as a service"@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Service"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#ServiceRobot   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#ServiceRobot

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#ServiceRobot is a leaf node.

Description

A robot in personal use or professional use that performs useful tasks for humans or equipment.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#ServiceRobot> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Service Robot"@en ;
dcterms:source "AI Watch, Defining Artificial Intelligence 2.0",
"ISO/IEC 22989, 3.1.29",
"SOURCE: ISO 8373:2021, 3.7" ;
rdfs:comment "A robot in personal use or professional use that performs useful tasks for humans or equipment."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#Robot> ;
skos:definition "A robot in personal use or professional use that performs useful tasks for humans or equipment."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Service Robot"@en .

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#SocialScoring

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#SocialScoring is a leaf node.

Description

rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/airo#AICapability> ;

skos:prefLabel "Uninformed Involvement"@en .

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning is a leaf node.

Description

Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

<https://w3id.org/vair#UnsupervisedLearning> a owl:Class,
owl:NamedIndividual,
skos:Concept,
<https://w3id.org/vair#Concept> ;
rdfs:label "Unsupervised Learning"@en ;
dcterms:source "ISO/IEC 22989, 3.3.17" ;
rdfs:comment "Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training."@en ;
rdfs:isDefinedBy <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
rdfs:subClassOf <https://w3id.org/vair#MachineLearning> ;
skos:definition "Machine learning that makes only use of unlabelled data during training."@en ;
skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Unsupervised Learning"@en .

Concept: https://w3id.org/vair#Validation   back to top

  • skos:Concept
    • https://w3id.org/vair#Validation

NOTE https://w3id.org/vair#Validation is a leaf node.

Description

Validating that the AI system from the design and development stage works according to requirements and meets objectives.

Implementation:

@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> .

skos:inScheme <https://w3id.org/vair#> ;
skos:prefLabel "Vulnerable Group"@en .
